chapters.en: We acknowledge, O LORD, our wickedness, the iniquity of our fathers: for we have sinned against thee.

chapters.zh: 求你为你名的缘故，不厌恶我们，不辱没你荣耀的宝座。求你追念，不要背了与我们所立的约。
chapters.en: Do not abhor , for thy name's sake, do not disgrace the throne of thy glory: remember, break not thy covenant with us.

chapters.zh: 外邦人虚无的神中有能降雨的么？天能自降甘霖么？耶和华 ─ 我们的神啊，能如此的不是你么？所以，我们仍要等候你，因为这一切都是你所造的。
chapters.en: Are there among the vanities of the Gentiles that can cause rain? or can the heavens give showers? not thou he, O LORD our God? therefore we will wait upon thee: for thou hast made all these .

chapters.zh: 耶和华对我说：虽有摩西和撒母耳站在我面前代求，我的心也不顾惜这百姓。你将他们从我眼前赶出，叫他们去罢！
chapters.en: Then said the LORD unto me, Though Moses and Samuel stood before me, my mind not toward this people: cast out of my sight, and let them go forth.

chapters.zh: 他们问你说：我们往哪里去呢？你便告诉他们，耶和华如此说：定为死亡的，必致死亡；定为刀杀的，必交刀杀；定为饥荒的，必遭饥荒；定为掳掠的，必被掳掠。
chapters.en: And it shall come to pass, if they say unto thee, Whither shall we go forth? then thou shalt tell them, Thus saith the LORD; Such as for death, to death; and such as for the sword, to the sword; and such as for the famine, to the famine; and such as for the captivity, to the captivity.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：我命定四样害他们，就是刀剑杀戮、狗类撕裂、空中的飞鸟，和地上的野兽吞吃毁灭；
chapters.en: And I will appoint over them four kinds, saith the LORD: the sword to slay, and the dogs to tear, and the fowls of the heaven, and the beasts of the earth, to devour and destroy.

chapters.zh: 又必使他们在天下万国中抛来抛去，都因犹大王希西家的儿子玛拿西在耶路撒冷所行的事。
chapters.en: And I will cause them to be removed into all kingdoms of the earth, because of Manasseh the son of Hezekiah king of Judah, for which he did in Jerusalem.

chapters.zh: 耶路撒冷啊，谁可怜你呢？谁为你悲伤呢？谁转身问你的安呢？
chapters.en: For who shall have pity upon thee, O Jerusalem? or who shall bemoan thee? or who shall go aside to ask how thou doest?

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：你弃绝了我，转身退后；因此我伸手攻击你，毁坏你。我后悔甚不耐烦。
chapters.en: Thou hast forsaken me, saith the LORD, thou art gone backward: therefore will I stretch out my hand against thee, and destroy thee; I am weary with repenting.

chapters.zh: 我在境内各城门口（或译：我在这地边界的关口），用簸箕簸了我的百姓，使他们丧掉儿女。我毁灭他们，他们仍不转离所行的道。
chapters.en: And I will fan them with a fan in the gates of the land; I will bereave of children, I will destroy my people, they return not from their ways.

chapters.zh: 他们的寡妇在我面前比海沙更多；我使灭命的午间来，攻击少年人的母亲，使痛苦惊吓忽然临到他身上。
chapters.en: Their widows are increased to me above the sand of the seas: I have brought upon them against the mother of the young men a spoiler at noonday: I have caused to fall upon it suddenly, and terrors upon the city.

chapters.zh: 生过七子的妇人力衰气绝；尚在白昼，日头忽落；他抱愧蒙羞。其余的人，我必在他们敌人跟前，交与刀剑。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: She that hath borne seven languisheth: she hath given up the ghost; her sun is gone down while yet day: she hath been ashamed and confounded: and the residue of them will I deliver to the sword before their enemies, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 我的母亲哪，我有祸了！因你生我作为遍地相争相竞的人。我素来没有借贷与人，人也没有借贷与我，人人却都咒骂我。
chapters.en: Woe is me, my mother, that thou hast borne me a man of strife and a man of contention to the whole earth! I have neither lent on usury, nor men have lent to me on usury; every one of them doth curse me.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：我必要坚固你，使你得好处。灾祸苦难临到的时候，我必要使仇敌央求你。
chapters.en: The LORD said, Verily it shall be well with thy remnant; verily I will cause the enemy to entreat thee in the time of evil and in the time of affliction.

chapters.zh: （人岂能将铜与铁，就是北方的铁折断呢？）
chapters.en: Shall iron break the northern iron and the steel?

chapters.zh: 我必因你在四境之内所犯的一切罪，把你的货物财宝当掠物，白白地交给仇敌。
chapters.en: Thy substance and thy treasures will I give to the spoil without price, and for all thy sins, even in all thy borders.

chapters.zh: 我也必使仇敌带这掠物到你所不认识的地去，因我怒中起的火要将你们焚烧。
chapters.en: And I will make to pass with thine enemies into a land thou knowest not: for a fire is kindled in mine anger, shall burn upon you.

chapters.zh: 耶和华啊，你是知道的；求你记念我，眷顾我，向逼迫我的人为我报仇；不要向他们忍怒取我的命，要知道我为你的缘故受了凌辱。
chapters.en: O LORD, thou knowest: remember me, and visit me, and revenge me of my persecutors; take me not away in thy longsuffering: know that for thy sake I have suffered rebuke.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 万军之神啊，我得著你的言语就当食物吃了；你的言语是我心中的欢喜快乐，因我是称为你名下的人。
chapters.en: Thy words were found, and I did eat them; and thy word was unto me the joy and rejoicing of mine heart: for I am called by thy name, O LORD God of hosts.

chapters.zh: 我没有坐在宴乐人的会中，也没有欢乐；我因你的感动（原文是手）独自静坐，因你使我满心愤恨。
chapters.en: I sat not in the assembly of the mockers, nor rejoiced; I sat alone because of thy hand: for thou hast filled me with indignation.

chapters.zh: 我的痛苦为何长久不止呢？我的伤痕为何无法医治、不能痊愈呢？难道你待我有诡诈，像流干的河道么？
chapters.en: Why is my pain perpetual, and my wound incurable, refuseth to be healed? wilt thou be altogether unto me as a liar, waters fail?

chapters.zh: 耶和华如此说：你若归回，我就将你再带来，使你站在我面前；你若将宝贵的和下贱的分别出来，你就可以当作我的口。他们必归向你，你却不可归向他们。
chapters.en: Therefore thus saith the LORD, If thou return, then will I bring thee again, thou shalt stand before me: and if thou take forth the precious from the vile, thou shalt be as my mouth: let them return unto thee; but return not thou unto them.

chapters.zh: 我必使你向这百姓成为坚固的铜墙；他们必攻击你，却不能胜你；因我与你同在，要拯救你，搭救你。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: And I will make thee unto this people a fenced brasen wall: and they shall fight against thee, but they shall not prevail against thee: for I with thee to save thee and to deliver thee, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 我必搭救你脱离恶人的手，救赎你脱离强暴人的手。
chapters.en: And I will deliver thee out of the hand of the wicked, and I will redeem thee out of the hand of the terrible.

chapters.zh: 耶和华的话又临到我说：
chapters.en: The word of the LORD came also unto me, saying,

chapters.zh: 你在这地方不可娶妻，生儿养女。
chapters.en: Thou shalt not take thee a wife, neither shalt thou have sons or daughters in this place.

chapters.zh: 因为论到在这地方所生的儿女，又论到在这国中生养他们的父母，耶和华如此说：
chapters.en: For thus saith the LORD concerning the sons and concerning the daughters that are born in this place, and concerning their mothers that bare them, and concerning their fathers that begat them in this land;

chapters.zh: 他们必死得甚苦，无人哀哭，必不得葬埋，必在地上像粪土，必被刀剑和饥荒灭绝；他们的尸首必给空中的飞鸟和地上的野兽作食物。
chapters.en: They shall die of grievous deaths; they shall not be lamented; neither shall they be buried; they shall be as dung upon the face of the earth: and they shall be consumed by the sword, and by famine; and their carcases shall be meat for the fowls of heaven, and for the beasts of the earth.

chapters.zh: 耶和华如此说：不要进入丧家，不要去哀哭，也不要为他们悲伤，因我已将我的平安、慈爱、怜悯从这百姓夺去了。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: For thus saith the LORD, Enter not into the house of mourning, neither go to lament nor bemoan them: for I have taken away my peace from this people, saith the LORD, lovingkindness and mercies.

chapters.zh: 连大带小，都必在这地死亡，不得葬埋。人必不为他们哀哭，不用刀划身，也不使头光秃。
chapters.en: Both the great and the small shall die in this land: they shall not be buried, neither shall lament for them, nor cut themselves, nor make themselves bald for them:

chapters.zh: 他们有丧事，人必不为他们擘饼，因死人安慰他们；他们丧父丧母，人也不给他们一杯酒安慰他们。
chapters.en: Neither shall tear for them in mourning, to comfort them for the dead; neither shall give them the cup of consolation to drink for their father or for their mother.

chapters.zh: 你不可进入宴乐的家，与他们同坐吃喝。
chapters.en: Thou shalt not also go into the house of feasting, to sit with them to eat and to drink.

chapters.zh: 因为万军之耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：你们还活著的日子在你们眼前，我必使欢喜和快乐的声音，新郎和新妇的声音，从这地方止息了。
chapters.en: For thus saith the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel; Behold, I will cause to cease out of this place in your eyes, and in your days, the voice of mirth, and the voice of gladness, the voice of the bridegroom, and the voice of the bride.

chapters.zh: 你将这一切的话指示这百姓。他们问你说：耶和华为甚么说，要降这大灾祸攻击我们呢？我们有甚么罪孽呢？我们向耶和华 ─ 我们的神犯了甚么罪呢？
chapters.en: And it shall come to pass, when thou shalt shew this people all these words, and they shall say unto thee, Wherefore hath the LORD pronounced all this great evil against us? or what our iniquity? or what our sin that we have committed against the LORD our God?

chapters.zh: 你就对他们说：耶和华说：因为你们列祖离弃我，随从别神，事奉敬拜，不遵守我的律法，
chapters.en: Then shalt thou say unto them, Because your fathers have forsaken me, saith the LORD, and have walked after other gods, and have served them, and have worshipped them, and have forsaken me, and have not kept my law;

chapters.zh: 而且你们行恶比你们列祖更甚；因为各人随从自己顽梗的恶心行事，甚至不听从我，
chapters.en: And ye have done worse than your fathers; for, behold, ye walk every one after the imagination of his evil heart, that they may not hearken unto me:

chapters.zh: 所以我必将你们从这地赶出，直赶到你们和你们列祖素不认识的地。你们在那里必昼夜事奉别神，因为我必不向你们施恩。
chapters.en: Therefore will I cast you out of this land into a land that ye know not, ye nor your fathers; and there shall ye serve other gods day and night; where I will not shew you favour.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：日子将到，人必不再指著那领以色列人从埃及地上来之永生的耶和华起誓，耶和华说：日子将到，人必不再指著那领以色列人从埃及地上来之永生的耶和华起誓，
chapters.en: Therefore, behold, the days come, saith the LORD, that it shall no more be said, The LORD liveth, that brought up the children of Israel out of the land of Egypt;

chapters.zh: 却要指著那领以色列人从北方之地，并赶他们到的各国上来之永生的耶和华起誓，并且我要领他们再入我从前赐给他们列祖之地。
chapters.en: But, The LORD liveth, that brought up the children of Israel from the land of the north, and from all the lands whither he had driven them: and I will bring them again into their land that I gave unto their fathers.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：我要召许多打鱼的把以色列人打上来，然后我要召许多打猎的，从各山上、各冈上、各石穴中猎取他们。
chapters.en: Behold, I will send for many fishers, saith the LORD, and they shall fish them; and after will I send for many hunters, and they shall hunt them from every mountain, and from every hill, and out of the holes of the rocks.

chapters.zh: 因我的眼目察看他们的一切行为；他们不能在我面前遮掩，他们的罪孽也不能在我眼前隐藏。
chapters.en: For mine eyes upon all their ways: they are not hid from my face, neither is their iniquity hid from mine eyes.

chapters.zh: 我先要加倍报应他们的罪孽和罪恶；因为他们用可憎之尸玷污我的地土，又用可厌之物充满我的产业。
chapters.en: And first I will recompense their iniquity and their sin double; because they have defiled my land, they have filled mine inheritance with the carcases of their detestable and abominable things.

chapters.zh: 耶和华啊，你是我的力量，是我的保障；在苦难之日是我的避难所。列国人必从地极来到你这里，说：我们列祖所承受的，不过是虚假，是虚空无益之物。
chapters.en: O LORD, my strength, and my fortress, and my refuge in the day of affliction, the Gentiles shall come unto thee from the ends of the earth, and shall say, Surely our fathers have inherited lies, vanity, and wherein no profit.

chapters.zh: 人岂可为自己制造神呢？其实这不是神。
chapters.en: Shall a man make gods unto himself, and they no gods?

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：我要使他们知道，就是这一次使他们知道我的手和我的能力。他们就知道我的名是耶和华了。
chapters.en: Therefore, behold, I will this once cause them to know, I will cause them to know mine hand and my might; and they shall know that my name The LORD.

chapters.zh: 犹大的罪是用铁笔、用金钢钻记录的，铭刻在他们的心版上和坛角上。
chapters.en: The sin of Judah written with a pen of iron, with the point of a diamond: graven upon the table of their heart, and upon the horns of your altars;

chapters.zh: 他们的儿女记念他们高冈上、青翠树旁的坛和木偶。
chapters.en: Whilst their children remember their altars and their groves by the green trees upon the high hills.

chapters.zh: 我田野的山哪，我必因你在四境之内所犯的罪，把你的货物、财宝，并邱坛当掠物交给仇敌；
chapters.en: O my mountain in the field, I will give thy substance all thy treasures to the spoil, thy high places for sin, throughout all thy borders.

chapters.zh: 并且你因自己的罪必失去我所赐给你的产业。我也必使你在你所不认识的地上服事你的仇敌；因为你使我怒中起火，直烧到永远。
chapters.en: And thou, even thyself, shalt discontinue from thine heritage that I gave thee; and I will cause thee to serve thine enemies in the land which thou knowest not: for ye have kindled a fire in mine anger, shall burn for ever.

chapters.zh: 耶和华如此说：倚靠人血肉的膀臂，心中离弃耶和华的，那人有祸了！
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD; Cursed the man that trusteth in man, and maketh flesh his arm, and whose heart departeth from the LORD.

chapters.zh: 因他必像沙漠的杜松，不见福乐来到，却要住旷野干旱之处，无人居住的碱地。
chapters.en: For he shall be like the heath in the desert, and shall not see when good cometh; but shall inhabit the parched places in the wilderness, a salt land and not inhabited.

chapters.zh: 倚靠耶和华、以耶和华为可靠的，那人有福了！
chapters.en: Blessed the man that trusteth in the LORD, and whose hope the LORD is.

chapters.zh: 他必像树栽于水旁，在河边扎根，炎热来到，并不惧怕，叶子仍必青翠，在干旱之年毫无挂虑，而且结果不止。
chapters.en: For he shall be as a tree planted by the waters, and spreadeth out her roots by the river, and shall not see when heat cometh, but her leaf shall be green; and shall not be careful in the year of drought, neither shall cease from yielding fruit.

chapters.zh: 人心比万物都诡诈，坏到极处，谁能识透呢？
chapters.en: The heart deceitful above all , and desperately wicked: who can know it?

chapters.zh: 我 ─ 耶和华是鉴察人心、试验人肺腑的，要照各人所行的和他做事的结果报应他。
chapters.en: I the LORD search the heart, try the reins, even to give every man according to his ways, according to the fruit of his doings.

chapters.zh: 那不按正道得财的，好像鹧鸪菢不是自己下的蛋；到了中年，那财都必离开他，他终久成为愚顽人。
chapters.en: the partridge sitteth , and hatcheth not; he that getteth riches, and not by right, shall leave them in the midst of his days, and at his end shall be a fool.

chapters.zh: 我们的圣所是荣耀的宝座，从太初安置在高处。
chapters.en: A glorious high throne from the beginning the place of our sanctuary.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 以色列的盼望啊，凡离弃你的必致蒙羞。耶和华说：离开我的，他们的名字必写在土里，因为他们离弃我这活水的泉源。
chapters.en: O LORD, the hope of Israel, all that forsake thee shall be ashamed, they that depart from me shall be written in the earth, because they have forsaken the LORD, the fountain of living waters.

chapters.zh: 耶和华啊，求你医治我，我便痊愈，拯救我，我便得救；因你是我所赞美的。
chapters.en: Heal me, O LORD, and I shall be healed; save me, and I shall be saved: for thou my praise.

chapters.zh: 他们对我说：耶和华的话在哪里呢？叫这话应验罢！
chapters.en: Behold, they say unto me, Where the word of the LORD? let it come now.

chapters.zh: 至于我，那跟从你作牧人的职分，我并没有急忙离弃，也没有想那灾殃的日子；这是你知道的。我口中所出的言语都在你面前。
chapters.en: As for me, I have not hastened from a pastor to follow thee: neither have I desired the woeful day; thou knowest: that which came out of my lips was before thee.

chapters.zh: 不要使我因你惊恐；当灾祸的日子，你是我的避难所。
chapters.en: Be not a terror unto me: thou my hope in the day of evil.

chapters.zh: 愿那些逼迫我的蒙羞，却不要使我蒙羞；使他们惊惶，却不要使我惊惶；使灾祸的日子临到他们，以加倍的毁坏毁坏他们。
chapters.en: Let them be confounded that persecute me, but let not me be confounded: let them be dismayed, but let not me be dismayed: bring upon them the day of evil, and destroy them with double destruction.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对我如此说：你去站在平民的门口，就是犹大君王出入的门，又站在耶路撒冷的各门口，
chapters.en: Thus said the LORD unto me; Go and stand in the gate of the children of the people, whereby the kings of Judah come in, and by the which they go out, and in all the gates of Jerusalem;

chapters.zh: 对他们说：你们这犹大君王和犹大众人，并耶路撒冷的一切居民，凡从这些门进入的都当听耶和华的话。
chapters.en: And say unto them, Hear ye the word of the LORD, ye kings of Judah, and all Judah, and all the inhabitants of Jerusalem, that enter in by these gates:

chapters.zh: 耶和华如此说：你们要谨慎，不要在安息日担甚么担子进入耶路撒冷的各门；
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD; Take heed to yourselves, and bear no burden on the sabbath day, nor bring in by the gates of Jerusalem;

chapters.zh: 也不要在安息日从家中担出担子去。无论何工都不可做，只要以安息日为圣日，正如我所吩咐你们列祖的。
chapters.en: Neither carry forth a burden out of your houses on the sabbath day, neither do ye any work, but hallow ye the sabbath day, as I commanded your fathers.

chapters.zh: 他们却不听从，不侧耳而听，竟硬著颈项不听，不受教训。
chapters.en: But they obeyed not, neither inclined their ear, but made their neck stiff, that they might not hear, nor receive instruction.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：你们若留意听从我，在安息日不担甚么担子进入这城的各门，只以安息日为圣日，在那日无论何工都不做；
chapters.en: And it shall come to pass, if ye diligently hearken unto me, saith the LORD, to bring in no burden through the gates of this city on the sabbath day, but hallow the sabbath day, to do no work therein;

chapters.zh: 那时就有坐大卫宝座的君王和首领，他们与犹大人，并耶路撒冷的居民，或坐车，或骑马，进入这城的各门，而且这城必存到永远。
chapters.en: Then shall there enter into the gates of this city kings and princes sitting upon the throne of David, riding in chariots and on horses, they, and their princes, the men of Judah, and the inhabitants of Jerusalem: and this city shall remain for ever.

chapters.zh: 也必有人从犹大城邑和耶路撒冷四围的各处，从便雅悯地、高原、山地，并南地而来，都带燔祭、平安祭、素祭，和乳香，并感谢祭，到耶和华的殿去。
chapters.en: And they shall come from the cities of Judah, and from the places about Jerusalem, and from the land of Benjamin, and from the plain, and from the mountains, and from the south, bringing burnt offerings, and sacrifices, and meat offerings, and incense, and bringing sacrifices of praise, unto the house of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 你们若不听从我，不以安息日为圣日，仍在安息日担担子，进入耶路撒冷的各门，我必在各门中点火；这火也必烧毁耶路撒冷的宫殿，不能熄灭。
chapters.en: But if ye will not hearken unto me to hallow the sabbath day, and not to bear a burden, even entering in at the gates of Jerusalem on the sabbath day; then will I kindle a fire in the gates thereof, and it shall devour the palaces of Jerusalem, and it shall not be quenched.

chapters.zh: 耶和华的话临到耶利米说：
chapters.en: The word which came to Jeremiah from the LORD, saying,

chapters.zh: 你起来，下到窑匠的家里去，我在那著要使你听我的话。
chapters.en: Arise, and go down to the potter's house, and there I will cause thee to hear my words.

chapters.zh: 我就下到窑匠的家里去，正遇他转轮做器皿。
chapters.en: Then I went down to the potter's house, and, behold, he wrought a work on the wheels.

chapters.zh: 窑匠用泥做的器皿，在他手中做坏了，他又用这泥另做别的器皿；窑匠看怎样好，就怎样做。
chapters.en: And the vessel that he made of clay was marred in the hand of the potter: so he made it again another vessel, as seemed good to the potter to make .

chapters.zh: 耶和华的话就临到我说：
chapters.en: Then the word of the LORD came to me, saying,

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：以色列家啊，我待你们，岂不能照这窑匠弄泥么？以色列家啊，泥在窑匠的手中怎样，你们在我的手中也怎样。
chapters.en: O house of Israel, cannot I do with you as this potter? saith the LORD. Behold, as the clay in the potter's hand, so ye in mine hand, O house of Israel.

chapters.zh: 我何时论到一邦或一国说，要拔出、拆毁、毁坏；
chapters.en: instant I shall speak concerning a nation, and concerning a kingdom, to pluck up, and to pull down, and to destroy ;

chapters.zh: 我所说的那一邦，若是转意离开他们的恶，我就必后悔，不将我想要施行的灾祸降与他们。
chapters.en: If that nation, against whom I have pronounced, turn from their evil, I will repent of the evil that I thought to do unto them.

chapters.zh: 我何时论到一邦或一国说，要建立、栽植；
chapters.en: And instant I shall speak concerning a nation, and concerning a kingdom, to build and to plant ;

chapters.zh: 他们若行我眼中看为恶的事，不听从我的话，我就必后悔，不将我所说的福气赐给他们。
chapters.en: If it do evil in my sight, that it obey not my voice, then I will repent of the good, wherewith I said I would benefit them.

chapters.zh: 现在你要对犹大人和耶路撒冷的居民说：耶和华如此说：我造出灾祸攻击你们，定意刑罚你们。你们各人当回头离开所行的恶道，改正你们的行动作为。
chapters.en: Now therefore go to, speak to the men of Judah, and to the inhabitants of Jerusalem, saying, Thus saith the LORD; Behold, I frame evil against you, and devise a device against you: return ye now every one from his evil way, and make your ways and your doings good.

chapters.zh: 他们却说：这是枉然。我们要照自己的计谋去行。各人随自己顽梗的恶心做事。
chapters.en: And they said, There is no hope: but we will walk after our own devices, and we will every one do the imagination of his evil heart.

chapters.zh: 所以，耶和华如此说：你们且往各国访问，有谁听见这样的事？以色列民（原文是处女）行了一件极可憎恶的事。
chapters.en: Therefore thus saith the LORD; Ask ye now among the heathen, who hath heard such things: the virgin of Israel hath done a very horrible thing.

chapters.zh: 利巴嫩的雪从田野的磐石上岂能断绝呢？从远处流下的凉水岂能干涸呢？
chapters.en: Will leave the snow of Lebanon from the rock of the field? shall the cold flowing waters that come from another place be forsaken?

chapters.zh: 我的百姓竟忘记我，向假神烧香，使他们在所行的路上，在古道上绊跌，使他们行没有修筑的斜路，
chapters.en: Because my people hath forgotten me, they have burned incense to vanity, and they have caused them to stumble in their ways the ancient paths, to walk in paths, a way not cast up;

chapters.zh: 以致他们的地令人惊骇，常常嗤笑；凡经过这地的必惊骇摇头。
chapters.en: To make their land desolate, a perpetual hissing; every one that passeth thereby shall be astonished, and wag his head.

chapters.zh: 我必在仇敌面前分散他们，好像用东风吹散一样。遭难的日子，我必以背向他们，不以面向他们。
chapters.en: I will scatter them as with an east wind before the enemy; I will shew them the back, and not the face, in the day of their calamity.

chapters.zh: 他们就说：来罢！我们可以设计谋害耶利米；因为我们有祭司讲律法，智慧人设谋略，先知说预言，都不能断绝。来罢！我们可以用舌头击打他，不要理会他的一切话。
chapters.en: Then said they, Come, and let us devise devices against Jeremiah; for the law shall not perish from the priest, nor counsel from the wise, nor the word from the prophet. Come, and let us smite him with the tongue, and let us not give heed to any of his words.

chapters.zh: 耶和华啊，求你理会我，且听那些与我争竞之人的话。
chapters.en: Give heed to me, O LORD, and hearken to the voice of them that contend with me.

chapters.zh: 岂可以恶报善呢？他们竟挖坑要害我的性命！求你记念我怎样站在你面前为他们代求，要使你的忿怒向他们转消。
chapters.en: Shall evil be recompensed for good? for they have digged a pit for my soul. Remember that I stood before thee to speak good for them, to turn away thy wrath from them.

chapters.zh: 故此，愿你将他们的儿女交与饥荒和刀剑；愿他们的妻无子，且作寡妇；又愿他们的男人被死亡所灭，他们的少年人在阵上被刀击杀。
chapters.en: Therefore deliver up their children to the famine, and pour out their by the force of the sword; and let their wives be bereaved of their children, and widows; and let their men be put to death; their young men slain by the sword in battle.

chapters.zh: 你使敌军忽然临到他们的时候，愿人听见哀声从他们的屋内发出；因他们挖坑要捉拿我，暗设网罗要绊我的脚。
chapters.en: Let a cry be heard from their houses, when thou shalt bring a troop suddenly upon them: for they have digged a pit to take me, and hid snares for my feet.

chapters.zh: 耶和华啊，他们要杀我的那一切计谋，你都知道。不要赦免他们的罪孽，也不要从你面前涂抹他们的罪恶，要叫他们在你面前跌倒；愿你发怒的时候罚办他们。
chapters.en: Yet, LORD, thou knowest all their counsel against me to slay : forgive not their iniquity, neither blot out their sin from thy sight, but let them be overthrown before thee; deal with them in the time of thine anger.

chapters.zh: 耶和华如此说：你去买窑匠的瓦瓶，又带百姓中的长老和祭司中的长老，
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD, Go and get a potter's earthen bottle, and of the ancients of the people, and of the ancients of the priests;

chapters.zh: 出去到欣嫩子谷、哈珥西（就是瓦片的意思）的门口那著，宣告我所吩咐你的话，
chapters.en: And go forth unto the valley of the son of Hinnom, which by the entry of the east gate, and proclaim there the words that I shall tell thee,

chapters.zh: 说：犹大君王和耶路撒冷的居民哪，当听耶和华的话。万军之耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：我必使灾祸临到这地方，凡听见的人都必耳鸣；
chapters.en: And say, Hear ye the word of the LORD, O kings of Judah, and inhabitants of Jerusalem; Thus saith the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel; Behold, I will bring evil upon this place, the which whosoever heareth, his ears shall tingle.

chapters.zh: 因为他们和他们列祖，并犹大君王离弃我，将这地方看为平常，在这里向素不认识的别神烧香，又使这地方满了无辜人的血，
chapters.en: Because they have forsaken me, and have estranged this place, and have burned incense in it unto other gods, whom neither they nor their fathers have known, nor the kings of Judah, and have filled this place with the blood of innocents;

chapters.zh: 又建筑巴力的邱坛，好在火中焚烧自己的儿子，作为燔祭献给巴力。这不是我所吩咐的，不是我所提说的，也不是我心所起的意。
chapters.en: They have built also the high places of Baal, to burn their sons with fire burnt offerings unto Baal, which I commanded not, nor spake , neither came into my mind:

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：因此，日子将到，这地方不再称为陀斐特和欣嫩子谷，反倒称为杀戮谷。
chapters.en: Therefore, behold, the days come, saith the LORD, that this place shall no more be called Tophet, nor The valley of the son of Hinnom, but The valley of slaughter.

chapters.zh: 我必在这地方使犹大和耶路撒冷的计谋落空，也必使他们在仇敌面前倒于刀下，并寻索其命的人手下。他们的尸首，我必给空中的飞鸟和地上的野兽作食物。
chapters.en: And I will make void the counsel of Judah and Jerusalem in this place; and I will cause them to fall by the sword before their enemies, and by the hands of them that seek their lives: and their carcases will I give to be meat for the fowls of the heaven, and for the beasts of the earth.

chapters.zh: 我必使这城令人惊骇嗤笑；凡经过的人，必因这城所遭的灾惊骇嗤笑。
chapters.en: And I will make this city desolate, and an hissing; every one that passeth thereby shall be astonished and hiss because of all the plagues thereof.

chapters.zh: 我必使他们在围困窘迫之中，就是仇敌和寻索其命的人窘迫他们的时候，各人吃自己儿女的肉和朋友的肉。
chapters.en: And I will cause them to eat the flesh of their sons and the flesh of their daughters, and they shall eat every one the flesh of his friend in the siege and straitness, wherewith their enemies, and they that seek their lives, shall straiten them.

chapters.zh: 你要在同去的人眼前打碎那瓶，
chapters.en: Then shalt thou break the bottle in the sight of the men that go with thee,

chapters.zh: 对他们说：万军之耶和华如此说：我要照样打碎这民和这城，正如人打碎窑匠的瓦器，以致不能再囫囵。并且人要在陀斐特葬埋尸首，甚至无处可葬。
chapters.en: And shalt say unto them, Thus saith the LORD of hosts; Even so will I break this people and this city, as breaketh a potter's vessel, that cannot be made whole again: and they shall bury in Tophet, till no place to bury.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：我必向这地方和其中的居民如此行，使这城与陀斐特一样。
chapters.en: Thus will I do unto this place, saith the LORD, and to the inhabitants thereof, and make this city as Tophet:

chapters.zh: 耶路撒冷的房屋和犹大君王的宫殿是已经被玷污的，就是他们在其上向天上的万象烧香、向别神浇奠祭的宫殿房屋，都必与陀斐特一样。
chapters.en: And the houses of Jerusalem, and the houses of the kings of Judah, shall be defiled as the place of Tophet, because of all the houses upon whose roofs they have burned incense unto all the host of heaven, and have poured out drink offerings unto other gods.

chapters.zh: 耶利米从陀斐特 ─ 就是耶和华差他去说预言的地方 ─ 回来，站在耶和华殿的院中，对众人说：
chapters.en: Then came Jeremiah from Tophet, whither the LORD had sent him to prophesy; and he stood in the court of the LORD'S house; and said to all the people,

chapters.zh: 万军之耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：我必使我所说的一切灾祸临到这城和属城的一切城邑，因为他们硬著颈项不听我的话。
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel; Behold, I will bring upon this city and upon all her towns all the evil that I have pronounced against it, because they have hardened their necks, that they might not hear my words.

chapters.zh: 祭司音麦的儿子巴施户珥作耶和华殿的总管，听见耶利米预言这些事，
chapters.en: Now Pashur the son of Immer the priest, who also chief governor in the house of the LORD, heard that Jeremiah prophesied these things.

chapters.zh: 他就打先知耶利米，用耶和华殿著便雅悯高门内的枷，将他枷在那里。
chapters.en: Then Pashur smote Jeremiah the prophet, and put him in the stocks that in the high gate of Benjamin, which by the house of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 次日，巴施户珥将耶利米开枷释放。于是耶利米对他说：耶和华不是叫你的名为巴施户珥，乃是叫你玛歌珥 • 米撒毕（就是四面惊吓的意思），
chapters.en: And it came to pass on the morrow, that Pashur brought forth Jeremiah out of the stocks. Then said Jeremiah unto him, The LORD hath not called thy name Pashur, but Magormissabib.

chapters.zh: 因耶和华如此说：我必使你自觉惊吓，你也必使众朋友惊吓；他们必倒在仇敌的刀下，你也必亲眼看见；我必将犹大人全交在巴比伦王的手中，他要将他们掳到巴比伦去，也要用刀将他们杀戮。
chapters.en: For thus saith the LORD, Behold, I will make thee a terror to thyself, and to all thy friends: and they shall fall by the sword of their enemies, and thine eyes shall behold : and I will give all Judah into the hand of the king of Babylon, and he shall carry them captive into Babylon, and shall slay them with the sword.

chapters.zh: 并且我要将这城中的一切货财和劳碌得来的，并一切珍宝，以及犹大君王所有的宝物，都交在他们仇敌的手中；仇敌要当作掠物带到巴比伦去。
chapters.en: Moreover I will deliver all the strength of this city, and all the labours thereof, and all the precious things thereof, and all the treasures of the kings of Judah will I give into the hand of their enemies, which shall spoil them, and take them, and carry them to Babylon.

chapters.zh: 你这巴施户珥和一切住在你家中的人都必被掳去；你和你的众朋友，就是你向他们说假预言的，都必到巴比伦去，要死在那著，葬在那著。
chapters.en: And thou, Pashur, and all that dwell in thine house shall go into captivity: and thou shalt come to Babylon, and there thou shalt die, and shalt be buried there, thou, and all thy friends, to whom thou hast prophesied lies.

chapters.zh: 耶和华啊，你曾劝导我，我也听了你的劝导。你比我有力量，且胜了我。我终日成为笑话，人人都戏弄我。
chapters.en: O LORD, thou hast deceived me, and I was deceived: thou art stronger than I, and hast prevailed: I am in derision daily, every one mocketh me.

chapters.zh: 我每逢讲论的时候，就发出哀声，我喊叫说：有强暴和毁灭！因为耶和华的话终日成了我的凌辱、讥刺。
chapters.en: For since I spake, I cried out, I cried violence and spoil; because the word of the LORD was made a reproach unto me, and a derision, daily.

chapters.zh: 我若说：我不再提耶和华，也不再奉他的名讲论，我便心里觉得似乎有烧著的火闭塞在我骨中，我就含忍不住，不能自禁。
chapters.en: Then I said, I will not make mention of him, nor speak any more in his name. But was in mine heart as a burning fire shut up in my bones, and I was weary with forbearing, and I could not .

chapters.zh: 我听见了许多人的谗谤，四围都是惊吓；就是我知己的朋友也都窥探我，愿我跌倒，说：告他罢，我们也要告他！或者他被引诱，我们就能胜他，在他身上报仇。
chapters.en: For I heard the defaming of many, fear on every side. Report, , and we will report it. All my familiars watched for my halting, , Peradventure he will be enticed, and we shall prevail against him, and we shall take our revenge on him.

chapters.zh: 然而，耶和华与我同在，好像甚可怕的勇士。因此，逼迫我的必都绊跌，不能得胜；他们必大大蒙羞，就是受永不忘记的羞辱，因为他们行事没有智慧。
chapters.en: But the LORD with me as a mighty terrible one: therefore my persecutors shall stumble, and they shall not prevail: they shall be greatly ashamed; for they shall not prosper: everlasting confusion shall never be forgotten.

chapters.zh: 试验义人、察看人肺腑心肠的万军之耶和华啊，求你容我见你在他们身上报仇，因我将我的案件向你禀明了。
chapters.en: But, O LORD of hosts, that triest the righteous, seest the reins and the heart, let me see thy vengeance on them: for unto thee have I opened my cause.

chapters.zh: 你们要向耶和华唱歌；赞美耶和华！因他救了穷人的性命脱离恶人的手。
chapters.en: Sing unto the LORD, praise ye the LORD: for he hath delivered the soul of the poor from the hand of evildoers.

chapters.zh: 愿我生的那日受咒诅；愿我母亲产我的那日不蒙福！
chapters.en: Cursed the day wherein I was born: let not the day wherein my mother bare me be blessed.

chapters.zh: 给我父亲报信说你得了儿子，使我父亲甚欢喜的，愿那人受咒诅。
chapters.en: Cursed the man who brought tidings to my father, saying, A man child is born unto thee; making him very glad.

chapters.zh: 愿那人像耶和华所倾覆而不后悔的城邑；愿他早晨听见哀声，晌午听见呐喊；
chapters.en: And let that man be as the cities which the LORD overthrew, and repented not: and let him hear the cry in the morning, and the shouting at noontide;

chapters.zh: 因他在我未出胎的时候不杀我，使我母亲成了我的坟墓，胎就时常重大。
chapters.en: Because he slew me not from the womb; or that my mother might have been my grave, and her womb always great .

chapters.zh: 我为何出胎见劳碌愁苦，使我的年日因羞愧消灭呢？
chapters.en: Wherefore came I forth out of the womb to see labour and sorrow, that my days should be consumed with shame?

chapters.zh: 耶和华的话临到耶利米。那时，西底家王打发玛基雅的儿子巴施户珥和玛西雅的儿子祭司西番雅去见耶利米，说：
chapters.en: The word which came unto Jeremiah from the LORD, when king Zedekiah sent unto him Pashur the son of Melchiah, and Zephaniah the son of Maaseiah the priest, saying,

chapters.zh: 请你为我们求问耶和华；因为巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒来攻击我们，或者耶和华照他一切奇妙的作为待我们，使巴比伦王离开我们上去。
chapters.en: Enquire, I pray thee, of the LORD for us; for Nebuchadrezzar king of Babylon maketh war against us; if so be that the LORD will deal with us according to all his wondrous works, that he may go up from us.

chapters.zh: 耶利米对他们说：你们当对西底家这样说：
chapters.en: Then said Jeremiah unto them, Thus shall ye say to Zedekiah:

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：我要使你们手中的兵器，就是你们在城外与巴比伦王和围困你们的迦勒底人打仗的兵器翻转过来，又要使这些都聚集在这城中。
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD God of Israel; Behold, I will turn back the weapons of war that in your hands, wherewith ye fight against the king of Babylon, and the Chaldeans, which besiege you without the walls, and I will assemble them into the midst of this city.

chapters.zh: 并且我要在怒气、忿怒，和大恼恨中，用伸出来的手，并大能的膀臂，亲自攻击你们；
chapters.en: And I myself will fight against you with an outstretched hand and with a strong arm, even in anger, and in fury, and in great wrath.

chapters.zh: 又要击打这城的居民，连人带牲畜都必遭遇大瘟疫死亡。
chapters.en: And I will smite the inhabitants of this city, both man and beast: they shall die of a great pestilence.

chapters.zh: 以后我要将犹大王西底家和他的臣仆百姓，就是在城内，从瘟疫、刀剑、饥荒中剩下的人，都交在巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒的手中和他们仇敌，并寻索其命的人手中。巴比伦王必用刀击杀他们，不顾惜，不可怜，不怜悯。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: And afterward, saith the LORD, I will deliver Zedekiah king of Judah, and his servants, and the people, and such as are left in this city from the pestilence, from the sword, and from the famine, into the hand of Nebuchadrezzar king of Babylon, and into the hand of their enemies, and into the hand of those that seek their life: and he shall smite them with the edge of the sword; he shall not spare them, neither have pity, nor have mercy.

chapters.zh: 你要对这百姓说：耶和华如此说：看哪，我将生命的路和死亡的路摆在你们面前。
chapters.en: And unto this people thou shalt say, Thus saith the LORD; Behold, I set before you the way of life, and the way of death.

chapters.zh: 住在这城著的必遭刀剑、饥荒、瘟疫而死；但出去归降围困你们迦勒底人的必得存活，要以自己的命为掠物。
chapters.en: He that abideth in this city shall die by the sword, and by the famine, and by the pestilence: but he that goeth out, and falleth to the Chaldeans that besiege you, he shall live, and his life shall be unto him for a prey.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：我向这城变脸，降祸不降福；这城必交在巴比伦王的手中，他必用火焚烧。
chapters.en: For I have set my face against this city for evil, and not for good, saith the LORD: it shall be given into the hand of the king of Babylon, and he shall burn it with fire.

chapters.zh: 至于犹大王的家，你们当听耶和华的话。
chapters.en: And touching the house of the king of Judah, , Hear ye the word of the LORD;

chapters.zh: 大卫家啊，耶和华如此说：你们每早晨要施行公平，拯救被抢夺的脱离欺压人的手，恐怕我的忿怒因你们的恶行发作，如火著起，甚至无人能以熄灭。
chapters.en: O house of David, thus saith the LORD; Execute judgment in the morning, and deliver spoiled out of the hand of the oppressor, lest my fury go out like fire, and burn that none can quench , because of the evil of your doings.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：住山谷和平原磐石上的居民，你们说：谁能下来攻击我们？谁能进入我们的住处呢？看哪，我与你们为敌。
chapters.en: Behold, I against thee, O inhabitant of the valley, rock of the plain, saith the LORD; which say, Who shall come down against us? or who shall enter into our habitations?

chapters.zh: 耶和华又说：我必按你们做事的结果刑罚你们；我也必使火在耶路撒冷的林中著起，将他四围所有的尽行烧灭。
chapters.en: But I will punish you according to the fruit of your doings, saith the LORD: and I will kindle a fire in the forest thereof, and it shall devour all things round about it.

chapters.zh: 耶和华如此说：你下到犹大王的宫中，在那著说这话，
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD; Go down to the house of the king of Judah, and speak there this word,

chapters.zh: 说：坐大卫宝座的犹大王啊，你和你的臣仆，并进入城门的百姓，都当听耶和华的话。
chapters.en: And say, Hear the word of the LORD, O king of Judah, that sittest upon the throne of David, thou, and thy servants, and thy people that enter in by these gates:

chapters.zh: 耶和华如此说：你们要施行公平和公义，拯救被抢夺的脱离欺压人的手，不可亏负寄居的和孤儿寡妇，不可以强暴待他们，在这地方也不可流无辜人的血。
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD; Execute ye judgment and righteousness, and deliver the spoiled out of the hand of the oppressor: and do no wrong, do no violence to the stranger, the fatherless, nor the widow, neither shed innocent blood in this place.

chapters.zh: 你们若认真行这事，就必有坐大卫宝座的君王和他的臣仆百姓，或坐车或骑马，从这城的各门进入。
chapters.en: For if ye do this thing indeed, then shall there enter in by the gates of this house kings sitting upon the throne of David, riding in chariots and on horses, he, and his servants, and his people.

chapters.zh: 你们若不听这些话，耶和华说：我指著自己起誓，这城必变为荒场。
chapters.en: But if ye will not hear these words, I swear by myself, saith the LORD, that this house shall become a desolation.

chapters.zh: 耶和华论到犹大王的家如此说：我看你如基列，如利巴嫩顶；然而，我必使你变为旷野，为无人居住的城邑。
chapters.en: For thus saith the LORD unto the king's house of Judah; Thou Gilead unto me, the head of Lebanon: surely I will make thee a wilderness, cities are not inhabited.

chapters.zh: 我要预备行毁灭的人，各拿器械攻击你；他们要砍下你佳美的香柏树，扔在火中。
chapters.en: And I will prepare destroyers against thee, every one with his weapons: and they shall cut down thy choice cedars, and cast into the fire.

chapters.zh: 许多国的民要经过这城，各人对邻舍说：耶和华为何向这大城如此行呢？
chapters.en: And many nations shall pass by this city, and they shall say every man to his neighbour, Wherefore hath the LORD done thus unto this great city?

chapters.zh: 他们必回答说：是因离弃了耶和华 ─ 他们神的约，事奉敬拜别神。
chapters.en: Then they shall answer, Because they have forsaken the covenant of the LORD their God, and worshipped other gods, and served them.

chapters.zh: 不要为死人哭号；不要为他悲伤，却要为离家出外的人大大哭号；因为他不得再回来，也不得再见他的本国。
chapters.en: Weep ye not for the dead, neither bemoan him: weep sore for him that goeth away: for he shall return no more, nor see his native country.

chapters.zh: 因为耶和华论到从这地方出去的犹大王约西亚的儿子沙龙（在王下23：30名约哈斯），就是接续他父亲约西亚作王的，这样说：他必不得再回到这里来，
chapters.en: For thus saith the LORD touching Shallum the son of Josiah king of Judah, which reigned instead of Josiah his father, which went forth out of this place; He shall not return thither any more:

chapters.zh: 却要死在被掳去的地方，必不得再见这地。
chapters.en: But he shall die in the place whither they have led him captive, and shall see this land no more.

chapters.zh: 那行不义盖房、行不公造楼、白白使用人的手工不给工价的有祸了！
chapters.en: Woe unto him that buildeth his house by unrighteousness, and his chambers by wrong; useth his neighbour's service without wages, and giveth him not for his work;

chapters.zh: 他说：我要为自己盖广大的房、宽敞的楼，为自己开窗户。这楼房的护墙板是香柏木的，楼房是丹色油漆的。
chapters.en: That saith, I will build me a wide house and large chambers, and cutteth him out windows; and cieled with cedar, and painted with vermilion.

chapters.zh: 难道你作王是在乎造香柏木楼房争胜么？你的父亲岂不是也吃也喝、也施行公平和公义么？那时他得了福乐。
chapters.en: Shalt thou reign, because thou closest in cedar? did not thy father eat and drink, and do judgment and justice, then well with him?

chapters.zh: 他为困苦和穷乏人伸冤，那时就得了福乐。认识我不在乎此么？这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: He judged the cause of the poor and needy; then well not this to know me? saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 惟有你的眼和你的心专顾贪婪，流无辜人的血，行欺压和强暴。
chapters.en: But thine eyes and thine heart not but for thy covetousness, and for to shed innocent blood, and for oppression, and for violence, to do .

chapters.zh: 所以，耶和华论到犹大王约西亚的儿子约雅敬如此说：人必不为他举哀说：哀哉！我的哥哥；或说：哀哉！我的姊姊；也不为他举哀说：哀哉！我的主；或说：哀哉！我主的荣华。
chapters.en: Therefore thus saith the LORD concerning Jehoiakim the son of Josiah king of Judah; They shall not lament for him, , Ah my brother! or, Ah sister! they shall not lament for him, , Ah lord! or, Ah his glory!

chapters.zh: 他被埋葬，好像埋驴一样，要拉出去扔在耶路撒冷的城门之外。
chapters.en: He shall be buried with the burial of an ass, drawn and cast forth beyond the gates of Jerusalem.

chapters.zh: 你要上利巴嫩哀号，在巴珊扬声，从亚巴琳哀号，因为你所亲爱的都毁灭了。
chapters.en: Go up to Lebanon, and cry; and lift up thy voice in Bashan, and cry from the passages: for all thy lovers are destroyed.

chapters.zh: 你兴盛的时候，我对你说话；你却说：我不听。你自幼年以来总是这样，不听从我的话。
chapters.en: I spake unto thee in thy prosperity; thou saidst, I will not hear. This thy manner from thy youth, that thou obeyedst not my voice.

chapters.zh: 你的牧人要被风吞吃，你所亲爱的必被掳去；那时你必因你一切的恶抱愧蒙羞。
chapters.en: The wind shall eat up all thy pastors, and thy lovers shall go into captivity: surely then shalt thou be ashamed and confounded for all thy wickedness.

chapters.zh: 你这住利巴嫩、在香柏树上搭窝的，有痛苦临到你，好像疼痛临到产难的妇人，那时你何等可怜！
chapters.en: O inhabitant of Lebanon, that makest thy nest in the cedars, how gracious shalt thou be when pangs come upon thee, the pain as of a woman in travail!

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：犹大王约雅敬的儿子哥尼雅（又名耶哥尼雅；下同），虽是我右手上带印的戒指，我凭我的永生起誓，也必将你从其上摘下来，
chapters.en: I live, saith the LORD, though Coniah the son of Jehoiakim king of Judah were the signet upon my right hand, yet would I pluck thee thence;

chapters.zh: 并且我必将你交给寻索你命的人和你所惧怕的人手中，就是巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒和迦勒底人的手中。
chapters.en: And I will give thee into the hand of them that seek thy life, and into the hand whose face thou fearest, even into the hand of Nebuchadrezzar king of Babylon, and into the hand of the Chaldeans.

chapters.zh: 我也必将你和生你的母亲赶到别国，并不是你们生的地方；你们必死在那里，
chapters.en: And I will cast thee out, and thy mother that bare thee, into another country, where ye were not born; and there shall ye die.

chapters.zh: 但心中甚想归回之地，必不得归回。
chapters.en: But to the land whereunto they desire to return, thither shall they not return.

chapters.zh: 哥尼雅这人是被轻看、破坏的器皿么？是无人喜爱的器皿么？他和他的后裔为何被赶到不认识之地呢？
chapters.en: this man Coniah a despised broken idol? a vessel wherein no pleasure? wherefore are they cast out, he and his seed, and are cast into a land which they know not?

chapters.zh: 地啊，地啊，地啊，当听耶和华的话！
chapters.en: O earth, earth, earth, hear the word of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 耶和华如此说：要写明这人算为无子，是平生不得亨通的；因为他后裔中再无一人得亨通，能坐在大卫的宝座上治理犹大。
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD, Write ye this man childless, a man shall not prosper in his days: for no man of his seed shall prosper, sitting upon the throne of David, and ruling any more in Judah.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：那些残害、赶散我草场之羊的牧人有祸了！
chapters.en: Woe be unto the pastors that destroy and scatter the sheep of my pasture! saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 以色列的神斥责那些牧养他百姓的牧人，如此说：你们赶散我的羊群，并没有看顾他们；我必讨你们这行恶的罪。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: Therefore thus saith the LORD God of Israel against the pastors that feed my people; Ye have scattered my flock, and driven them away, and have not visited them: behold, I will visit upon you the evil of your doings, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 我要将我羊群中所余剩的，从我赶他们到的各国内招聚出来，领他们归回本圈；他们也必生养众多。
chapters.en: And I will gather the remnant of my flock out of all countries whither I have driven them, and will bring them again to their folds; and they shall be fruitful and increase.

chapters.zh: 我必设立照管他们的牧人，牧养他们。他们不再惧怕，不再惊惶，也不缺少一个；这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: And I will set up shepherds over them which shall feed them: and they shall fear no more, nor be dismayed, neither shall they be lacking, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：日子将到，我要给大卫兴起一个公义的苗裔；他必掌王权，行事有智慧，在地上施行公平和公义。
chapters.en: Behold, the days come, saith the LORD, that I will raise unto David a righteous Branch, and a King shall reign and prosper, and shall execute judgment and justice in the earth.

chapters.zh: 在他的日子，犹大必得救，以色列也安然居住。他的名必称为耶和华 ─ 我们的义。
chapters.en: In his days Judah shall be saved, and Israel shall dwell safely: and this his name whereby he shall be called, THE LORD OUR RIGHTEOUSNESS.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：日子将到，人必不再指著那领以色列人从埃及地上来永生的耶和华起誓，
chapters.en: Therefore, behold, the days come, saith the LORD, that they shall no more say, The LORD liveth, which brought up the children of Israel out of the land of Egypt;

chapters.zh: 却要指著那领以色列家的后裔从北方和赶他们到的各国中上来、永生的耶和华起誓。他们必住在本地。
chapters.en: But, The LORD liveth, which brought up and which led the seed of the house of Israel out of the north country, and from all countries whither I had driven them; and they shall dwell in their own land.

chapters.zh: 论到那些先知，我心在我里面忧伤，我骨头都发颤；因耶和华和他的圣言，我像醉酒的人，像被酒所胜的人。
chapters.en: Mine heart within me is broken because of the prophets; all my bones shake; I am like a drunken man, and like a man whom wine hath overcome, because of the LORD, and because of the words of his holiness.

chapters.zh: 地满了行淫的人！因妄自赌咒，地就悲哀；旷野的草场都枯干了。他们所行的道乃是恶的；他们的勇力使得不正。
chapters.en: For the land is full of adulterers; for because of swearing the land mourneth; the pleasant places of the wilderness are dried up, and their course is evil, and their force not right.

chapters.zh: 连先知带祭司都是亵渎的，就是在我殿中我也看见他们的恶。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: For both prophet and priest are profane; yea, in my house have I found their wickedness, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 因此，他们的道路必像黑暗中的滑地，他们必被追赶，在这路中仆倒；因为当追讨之年，我必使灾祸临到他们。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: Wherefore their way shall be unto them as slippery in the darkness: they shall be driven on, and fall therein: for I will bring evil upon them, the year of their visitation, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 我在撒玛利亚的先知中曾见愚妄；他们藉巴力说预言，使我的百姓以色列走错了路。
chapters.en: And I have seen folly in the prophets of Samaria; they prophesied in Baal, and caused my people Israel to err.

chapters.zh: 我在耶路撒冷的先知中曾见可憎恶的事；他们行奸淫，做事虚妄，又坚固恶人的手，甚至无人回头离开他的恶。他们在我面前都像所多玛；耶路撒冷的居民都像蛾摩拉。
chapters.en: I have seen also in the prophets of Jerusalem an horrible thing: they commit adultery, and walk in lies: they strengthen also the hands of evildoers, that none doth return from his wickedness: they are all of them unto me as Sodom, and the inhabitants thereof as Gomorrah.

chapters.zh: 所以万军之耶和华论到先知如此说：我必将茵 𫈟 给他们吃，又将苦胆水给他们喝；因为亵渎的事出于耶路撒冷的先知，流行遍地。
chapters.en: Therefore thus saith the LORD of hosts concerning the prophets; Behold, I will feed them with wormwood, and make them drink the water of gall: for from the prophets of Jerusalem is profaneness gone forth into all the land.

chapters.zh: 万军之耶和华如此说：这些先知向你们说预言，你们不要听他们的话。他们以虚空教训你们，所说的异象是出于自己的心，不是出于耶和华的口。
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD of hosts, Hearken not unto the words of the prophets that prophesy unto you: they make you vain: they speak a vision of their own heart, not out of the mouth of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 他们常对藐视我的人说：『耶和华说：你们必享平安』；又对一切按自己顽梗之心而行的人说：『必没有灾祸临到你们。』」
chapters.en: They say still unto them that despise me, The LORD hath said, Ye shall have peace; and they say unto every one that walketh after the imagination of his own heart, No evil shall come upon you.

chapters.zh: 有谁站在耶和华的会中得以听见并会悟他的话呢？有谁留心听他的话呢？
chapters.en: For who hath stood in the counsel of the LORD, and hath perceived and heard his word? who hath marked his word, and heard ?

chapters.zh: 看哪！耶和华的忿怒好像暴风，已经发出；是暴烈的旋风，必转到恶人的头上。
chapters.en: Behold, a whirlwind of the LORD is gone forth in fury, even a grievous whirlwind: it shall fall grievously upon the head of the wicked.

chapters.zh: 耶和华的怒气必不转消，直到他心中所拟定的成就了。末后的日子你们要全然明白。
chapters.en: The anger of the LORD shall not return, until he have executed, and till he have performed the thoughts of his heart: in the latter days ye shall consider it perfectly.

chapters.zh: 我没有打发那些先知，他们竟自奔跑；我没有对他们说话，他们竟自预言。
chapters.en: I have not sent these prophets, yet they ran: I have not spoken to them, yet they prophesied.

chapters.zh: 他们若是站在我的会中，就必使我的百姓听我的话，又使他们回头离开恶道和他们所行的恶。
chapters.en: But if they had stood in my counsel, and had caused my people to hear my words, then they should have turned them from their evil way, and from the evil of their doings.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：我岂为近处的神呢？不也为远处的神么？
chapters.en: I a God at hand, saith the LORD, and not a God afar off?

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：人岂能在隐密处藏身，使我看不见他呢？耶和华说：我岂不充满天地么？
chapters.en: Can any hide himself in secret places that I shall not see him? saith the LORD. Do not I fill heaven and earth? saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 我已听见那些先知所说的，就是托我名说的假预言，他们说：我做了梦！我做了梦！
chapters.en: I have heard what the prophets said, that prophesy lies in my name, saying, I have dreamed, I have dreamed.

chapters.zh: 说假预言的先知，就是预言本心诡诈的先知，他们这样存心要到几时呢？
chapters.en: How long shall be in the heart of the prophets that prophesy lies? yea, prophets of the deceit of their own heart;

chapters.zh: 他们各人将所做的梦对邻舍述说，想要使我的百姓忘记我的名，正如他们列祖因巴力忘记我的名一样。
chapters.en: Which think to cause my people to forget my name by their dreams which they tell every man to his neighbour, as their fathers have forgotten my name for Baal.

chapters.zh: 得梦的先知可以述说那梦；得我话的人可以诚实讲说我的话。糠秕怎能与麦子比较呢？这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: The prophet that hath a dream, let him tell a dream; and he that hath my word, let him speak my word faithfully. What the chaff to the wheat? saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：我的话岂不像火，又像能打碎磐石的大锤么？
chapters.en: not my word like as a fire? saith the LORD; and like a hammer breaketh the rock in pieces?

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：那些先知各从邻舍偷窃我的言语，因此我必与他们反对。
chapters.en: Therefore, behold, I against the prophets, saith the LORD, that steal my words every one from his neighbour.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：那些先知用舌头，说是耶和华说的；我必与他们反对。
chapters.en: Behold, I against the prophets, saith the LORD, that use their tongues, and say, He saith.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：那些以幻梦为预言，又述说这梦，以谎言和矜夸使我百姓走错了路的，我必与他们反对。我没有打发他们，也没有吩咐他们。他们与这百姓毫无益处。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: Behold, I against them that prophesy false dreams, saith the LORD, and do tell them, and cause my people to err by their lies, and by their lightness; yet I sent them not, nor commanded them: therefore they shall not profit this people at all, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 无论是百姓，是先知，是祭司，问你说：耶和华有甚么默示呢？你就对他们说：甚么默示啊？耶和华说：我要撇弃你们。
chapters.en: And when this people, or the prophet, or a priest, shall ask thee, saying, What the burden of the LORD? thou shalt then say unto them, What burden? I will even forsake you, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 无论是先知，是祭司，是百姓，说耶和华的默示，我必刑罚那人和他的家。
chapters.en: And the prophet, and the priest, and the people, that shall say, The burden of the LORD, I will even punish that man and his house.

chapters.zh: 你们各人要对邻舍，各人要对弟兄如此说：耶和华回答甚么？耶和华说了甚么呢？
chapters.en: Thus shall ye say every one to his neighbour, and every one to his brother, What hath the LORD answered? and, What hath the LORD spoken?

chapters.zh: 耶和华的默示你们不可再提，各人所说的话必作自己的重担（重担和默示原文同），因为你们谬用永生神、万军之耶和华 ─ 我们神的言语。
chapters.en: And the burden of the LORD shall ye mention no more: for every man's word shall be his burden; for ye have perverted the words of the living God, of the LORD of hosts our God.

chapters.zh: 你们要对先知如此说：耶和华回答你甚么？耶和华说了甚么呢？
chapters.en: Thus shalt thou say to the prophet, What hath the LORD answered thee? and, What hath the LORD spoken?

chapters.zh: 你们若说耶和华的默示，耶和华就如此说：因你们说耶和华的默示这句话，我也打发人到你们那里去，告诉你们不可说耶和华的默示。
chapters.en: But since ye say, The burden of the LORD; therefore thus saith the LORD; Because ye say this word, The burden of the LORD, and I have sent unto you, saying, Ye shall not say, The burden of the LORD;

chapters.zh: 所以我必全然忘记你们，将你们和我所赐给你们并你们列祖的城撇弃了；
chapters.en: Therefore, behold, I, even I, will utterly forget you, and I will forsake you, and the city that I gave you and your fathers, out of my presence:

chapters.zh: 又必使永远的凌辱和长久的羞耻临到你们，是不能忘记的。
chapters.en: And I will bring an everlasting reproach upon you, and a perpetual shame, which shall not be forgotten.

chapters.zh: 巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒将犹大王约雅敬的儿子耶哥尼雅和犹大的首领，并工匠、铁匠从耶路撒冷掳去，带到巴比伦。这事以后，耶和华指给我看，有两筐无花果放在耶和华的殿前。
chapters.en: The LORD shewed me, and, behold, two baskets of figs set before the temple of the LORD, after that Nebuchadrezzar king of Babylon had carried away captive Jeconiah the son of Jehoiakim king of Judah, and the princes of Judah, with the carpenters and smiths, from Jerusalem, and had brought them to Babylon.

chapters.zh: 一筐是极好的无花果，好像是初熟的；一筐是极坏的无花果，坏得不可吃。
chapters.en: One basket very good figs, like the figs first ripe: and the other basket very naughty figs, which could not be eaten, they were so bad.

chapters.zh: 于是耶和华问我说：耶利米你看见甚么？我说：我看见无花果，好的极好，坏的极坏，坏得不可吃。
chapters.en: Then said the LORD unto me, What seest thou, Jeremiah? And I said, Figs; the good figs, very good; and the evil, very evil, that cannot be eaten, they are so evil.

chapters.zh: 耶和华的话临到我说：
chapters.en: Again the word of the LORD came unto me, saying,

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：被掳去的犹大人，就是我打发离开这地到迦勒底人之地去的，我必看顾他们如这好无花果，使他们得好处。
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD, the God of Israel; Like these good figs, so will I acknowledge them that are carried away captive of Judah, whom I have sent out of this place into the land of the Chaldeans for good.

chapters.zh: 我要眷顾他们，使他们得好处，领他们归回这地。我也要建立他们，必不拆毁；栽植他们，并不拔出。
chapters.en: For I will set mine eyes upon them for good, and I will bring them again to this land: and I will build them, and not pull down; and I will plant them, and not pluck up.

chapters.zh: 我要赐他们认识我的心，知道我是耶和华。他们要作我的子民，我要作他们的神，因为他们要一心归向我。
chapters.en: And I will give them an heart to know me, that I the LORD: and they shall be my people, and I will be their God: for they shall return unto me with their whole heart.

chapters.zh: 耶和华如此说：我必将犹大王西底家和他的首领，以及剩在这地耶路撒冷的余民，并住在埃及地的犹大人都交出来，好像那极坏、坏得不可吃的无花果。
chapters.en: And as the evil figs, which cannot be eaten, they are so evil; surely thus saith the LORD, So will I give Zedekiah the king of Judah, and his princes, and the residue of Jerusalem, that remain in this land, and them that dwell in the land of Egypt:

chapters.zh: 我必使他们交出来，在天下万国中抛来抛去，遭遇灾祸；在我赶逐他们到的各处成为凌辱、笑谈、讥刺、咒诅。
chapters.en: And I will deliver them to be removed into all the kingdoms of the earth for hurt, a reproach and a proverb, a taunt and a curse, in all places whither I shall drive them.

chapters.zh: 我必使刀剑、饥荒、瘟疫临到他们，直到他们从我所赐给他们和他们列祖之地灭绝。
chapters.en: And I will send the sword, the famine, and the pestilence, among them, till they be consumed from off the land that I gave unto them and to their fathers.

chapters.zh: 犹大王约西亚的儿子约雅敬第四年，就是巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒的元年，耶和华论犹大众民的话临到耶利米。
chapters.en: The word that came to Jeremiah concerning all the people of Judah in the fourth year of Jehoiakim the son of Josiah king of Judah, that the first year of Nebuchadrezzar king of Babylon;

chapters.zh: 先知耶利米就将这话对犹大众人和耶路撒冷的一切居民说：
chapters.en: The which Jeremiah the prophet spake unto all the people of Judah, and to all the inhabitants of Jerusalem, saying,

chapters.zh: 从犹大王亚们的儿子约西亚十三年直到今日，这二十三年之内，常有耶和华的话临到我；我也对你们传说，就是从早起来传说，只是你们没有听从。
chapters.en: From the thirteenth year of Josiah the son of Amon king of Judah, even unto this day, that the three and twentieth year, the word of the LORD hath come unto me, and I have spoken unto you, rising early and speaking; but ye have not hearkened.

chapters.zh: 耶和华也从早起来，差遣他的仆人众先知到你们这里来（只是你们没有听从，也没有侧耳而听），
chapters.en: And the LORD hath sent unto you all his servants the prophets, rising early and sending ; but ye have not hearkened, nor inclined your ear to hear.

chapters.zh: 说：你们各人当回头，离开恶道和所作的恶，便可居住耶和华古时所赐给你们和你们列祖之地，直到永远。
chapters.en: They said, Turn ye again now every one from his evil way, and from the evil of your doings, and dwell in the land that the LORD hath given unto you and to your fathers for ever and ever:

chapters.zh: 不可随从别神事奉敬拜，以你们手所作的惹我发怒；这样，我就不加害与你们。
chapters.en: And go not after other gods to serve them, and to worship them, and provoke me not to anger with the works of your hands; and I will do you no hurt.

chapters.zh: 然而你们没有听从我，竟以手所做的惹我发怒，陷害自己。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: Yet ye have not hearkened unto me, saith the LORD; that ye might provoke me to anger with the works of your hands to your own hurt.

chapters.zh: 所以万军之耶和华如此说：因为你们没有听从我的话，
chapters.en: Therefore thus saith the LORD of hosts; Because ye have not heard my words,

chapters.zh: 我必召北方的众族和我仆人巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒来攻击这地和这地的居民，并四围一切的国民。我要将他们尽行灭绝，以致他们令人惊骇、嗤笑，并且永久荒凉。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: Behold, I will send and take all the families of the north, saith the LORD, and Nebuchadrezzar the king of Babylon, my servant, and will bring them against this land, and against the inhabitants thereof, and against all these nations round about, and will utterly destroy them, and make them an astonishment, and an hissing, and perpetual desolations.

chapters.zh: 我又要使欢喜和快乐的声音，新郎和新妇的声音，推磨的声音和灯的亮光，从他们中间止息。
chapters.en: Moreover I will take from them the voice of mirth, and the voice of gladness, the voice of the bridegroom, and the voice of the bride, the sound of the millstones, and the light of the candle.

chapters.zh: 这全地必然荒凉，令人惊骇。这些国民要服事巴比伦王七十年。
chapters.en: And this whole land shall be a desolation, an astonishment; and these nations shall serve the king of Babylon seventy years.

chapters.zh: 七十年满了以后，我必刑罚巴比伦王和那国民，并迦勒底人之地，因他们的罪孽使那地永远荒凉。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: And it shall come to pass, when seventy years are accomplished, I will punish the king of Babylon, and that nation, saith the LORD, for their iniquity, and the land of the Chaldeans, and will make it perpetual desolations.

chapters.zh: 我也必使我向那地所说的话，就是记在这书上的话，是耶利米向这些国民说的预言，都临到那地。
chapters.en: And I will bring upon that land all my words which I have pronounced against it, all that is written in this book, which Jeremiah hath prophesied against all the nations.

chapters.zh: 因为有多国和大君王必使迦勒底人作奴仆；我也必照他们的行为，按他们手所做的报应他们。
chapters.en: For many nations and great kings shall serve themselves of them also: and I will recompense them according to their deeds, and according to the works of their own hands.

chapters.zh: 耶和华 ─ 以色列的神对我如此说：你从我手中接这杯忿怒的酒，使我所差遣你去的各国的民喝。
chapters.en: For thus saith the LORD God of Israel unto me; Take the wine cup of this fury at my hand, and cause all the nations, to whom I send thee, to drink it.

chapters.zh: 他们喝了就要东倒西歪，并要发狂，因我使刀剑临到他们中间。
chapters.en: And they shall drink, and be moved, and be mad, because of the sword that I will send among them.

chapters.zh: 我就从耶和华的手中接了这杯，给耶和华所差遣我去的各国的民喝，
chapters.en: Then took I the cup at the LORD'S hand, and made all the nations to drink, unto whom the LORD had sent me:

chapters.zh: 就是耶路撒冷和犹大的城邑，并耶路撒冷的君王与首领，使这城邑荒凉，令人惊骇、嗤笑、咒诅，正如今日一样。
chapters.en: , Jerusalem, and the cities of Judah, and the kings thereof, and the princes thereof, to make them a desolation, an astonishment, an hissing, and a curse; as this day;

chapters.zh: 又有埃及王法老和他的臣仆、首领，以及他的众民，
chapters.en: Pharaoh king of Egypt, and his servants, and his princes, and all his people;

chapters.zh: 并杂族的人民和乌斯地的诸王，与非利士地的诸王（亚实基伦、迦萨、以革伦，以及亚实突剩下的人）；
chapters.en: And all the mingled people, and all the kings of the land of Uz, and all the kings of the land of the Philistines, and Ashkelon, and Azzah, and Ekron, and the remnant of Ashdod,

chapters.zh: 以东、摩押、亚扪人、
chapters.en: Edom, and Moab, and the children of Ammon,

chapters.zh: 推罗的诸王、西顿的诸王、海岛的诸王、
chapters.en: And all the kings of Tyrus, and all the kings of Zidon, and the kings of the isles which beyond the sea,

chapters.zh: 底但、提玛、布斯，和一切剃周围头发的；
chapters.en: Dedan, and Tema, and Buz, and all in the utmost corners,

chapters.zh: 亚拉伯的诸王、住旷野杂族人民的诸王、
chapters.en: And all the kings of Arabia, and all the kings of the mingled people that dwell in the desert,

chapters.zh: 心利的诸王、以拦的诸王、玛代的诸王、
chapters.en: And all the kings of Zimri, and all the kings of Elam, and all the kings of the Medes,

chapters.zh: 北方远近的诸王，以及天下地上的万国喝了，以后示沙克（就是巴比伦）王也要喝。
chapters.en: And all the kings of the north, far and near, one with another, and all the kingdoms of the world, which upon the face of the earth: and the king of Sheshach shall drink after them.

chapters.zh: 你要对他们说：万军之耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：你们要喝，且要喝醉，要呕吐，且要跌倒，不得再起来，都因我使刀剑临到你们中间。
chapters.en: Therefore thou shalt say unto them, Thus saith the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel; Drink ye, and be drunken, and spue, and fall, and rise no more, because of the sword which I will send among you.

chapters.zh: 他们若不肯从你手接这杯喝，你就要对他们说：万军之耶和华如此说：你们一定要喝！
chapters.en: And it shall be, if they refuse to take the cup at thine hand to drink, then shalt thou say unto them, Thus saith the LORD of hosts; Ye shall certainly drink.

chapters.zh: 我既从称为我名下的城起首施行灾祸，你们能尽免刑罚么？你们必不能免，因为我要命刀剑临到地上一切的居民。这是万军之耶和华说的。
chapters.en: For, lo, I begin to bring evil on the city which is called by my name, and should ye be utterly unpunished? Ye shall not be unpunished: for I will call for a sword upon all the inhabitants of the earth, saith the LORD of hosts.

chapters.zh: 所以你要向他们预言这一切的话，攻击他们，说：耶和华必从高天吼叫，从圣所发声，向自己的羊群大声吼叫；他要向地上一切的居民呐喊，像踹葡萄的一样。
chapters.en: Therefore prophesy thou against them all these words, and say unto them, The LORD shall roar from on high, and utter his voice from his holy habitation; he shall mightily roar upon his habitation; he shall give a shout, as they that tread , against all the inhabitants of the earth.

chapters.zh: 必有响声达到地极，因为耶和华与列国相争；凡有血气的，他必审问；至于恶人，他必交给刀剑。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: A noise shall come to the ends of the earth; for the LORD hath a controversy with the nations, he will plead with all flesh; he will give them wicked to the sword, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 万军之耶和华如此说：看哪，必有灾祸从这国发到那国，并有大暴风从地极刮起。
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD of hosts, Behold, evil shall go forth from nation to nation, and a great whirlwind shall be raised up from the coasts of the earth.

chapters.zh: 到那日，从地这边直到地那边都有耶和华所杀戮的。必无人哀哭，不得收殓，不得葬埋，必在地上成为粪土。
chapters.en: And the slain of the LORD shall be at that day from end of the earth even unto the end of the earth: they shall not be lamented, neither gathered, nor buried; they shall be dung upon the ground.

chapters.zh: 牧人哪，你们当哀号，呼喊；群众的头目啊，你们要滚在灰中；因为你们被杀戮分散的日子足足来到。你们要跌碎，好像美器打碎一样。
chapters.en: Howl, ye shepherds, and cry; and wallow yourselves , ye principal of the flock: for the days of your slaughter and of your dispersions are accomplished; and ye shall fall like a pleasant vessel.

chapters.zh: 牧人无路逃跑；群众的头目也无法逃脱。
chapters.en: And the shepherds shall have no way to flee, nor the principal of the flock to escape.

chapters.zh: 听啊，有牧人呼喊，有群众头目哀号的声音，因为耶和华使他们的草场变为荒场。
chapters.en: A voice of the cry of the shepherds, and an howling of the principal of the flock, : for the LORD hath spoiled their pasture.

chapters.zh: 耶和华发出猛烈的怒气，平安的羊圈就都寂静无声。
chapters.en: And the peaceable habitations are cut down because of the fierce anger of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 他离了隐密处像狮子一样，他们的地，因刀剑凶猛的欺压，又因他猛烈的怒气都成为可惊骇的。
chapters.en: He hath forsaken his covert, as the lion: for their land is desolate because of the fierceness of the oppressor, and because of his fierce anger.

chapters.zh: 犹大王约西亚的儿子约雅敬登基的时候，有这话从耶和华临到耶利米说：
chapters.en: In the beginning of the reign of Jehoiakim the son of Josiah king of Judah came this word from the LORD, saying,

chapters.zh: 耶和华如此说：你站在耶和华殿的院内，对犹大众城邑的人，就是到耶和华殿来礼拜的，说我所吩咐你的一切话，一字不可删减。
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD; Stand in the court of the LORD'S house, and speak unto all the cities of Judah, which come to worship in the LORD'S house, all the words that I command thee to speak unto them; diminish not a word:

chapters.zh: 或者他们肯听从，各人回头离开恶道，使我后悔不将我因他们所行的恶，想要施行的灾祸降与他们。
chapters.en: If so be they will hearken, and turn every man from his evil way, that I may repent me of the evil, which I purpose to do unto them because of the evil of their doings.

chapters.zh: 你要对他们说，耶和华如此说：你们若不听从我，不遵行我设立在你们面前的律法，
chapters.en: And thou shalt say unto them, Thus saith the LORD; If ye will not hearken to me, to walk in my law, which I have set before you,

chapters.zh: 不听我从早起来差遣到你们那著去我仆人众先知的话（你们还是没有听从），
chapters.en: To hearken to the words of my servants the prophets, whom I sent unto you, both rising up early, and sending , but ye have not hearkened;

chapters.zh: 我就必使这殿如示罗，使这城为地上万国所咒诅的。
chapters.en: Then will I make this house like Shiloh, and will make this city a curse to all the nations of the earth.

chapters.zh: 耶利米在耶和华殿中说的这些话，祭司、先知与众民都听见了。
chapters.en: So the priests and the prophets and all the people heard Jeremiah speaking these words in the house of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 耶利米说完了耶和华所吩咐他对众人说的一切话，祭司、先知与众民都来抓住他，说：你必要死！
chapters.en: Now it came to pass, when Jeremiah had made an end of speaking all that the LORD had commanded to speak unto all the people, that the priests and the prophets and all the people took him, saying, Thou shalt surely die.

chapters.zh: 你为何托耶和华的名预言，说这殿必如示罗，这城必变为荒场无人居住呢？于是众民都在耶和华的殿中聚集到耶利米那著。
chapters.en: Why hast thou prophesied in the name of the LORD, saying, This house shall be like Shiloh, and this city shall be desolate without an inhabitant? And all the people were gathered against Jeremiah in the house of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 犹大的首领听见这事，就从王宫上到耶和华的殿，坐在耶和华殿的新门口。
chapters.en: When the princes of Judah heard these things, then they came up from the king's house unto the house of the LORD, and sat down in the entry of the new gate of the LORD'S .

chapters.zh: 祭司、先知对首领和众民说：这人是该死的；因为他说预言攻击这城，正如你们亲耳所听见的。
chapters.en: Then spake the priests and the prophets unto the princes and to all the people, saying, This man worthy to die; for he hath prophesied against this city, as ye have heard with your ears.

chapters.zh: 耶利米就对众首领和众民说：耶和华差遣我预言，攻击这殿和这城，说你们所听见的这一切话。
chapters.en: Then spake Jeremiah unto all the princes and to all the people, saying, The LORD sent me to prophesy against this house and against this city all the words that ye have heard.

chapters.zh: 现在要改正你们的行动作为，听从耶和华 ─ 你们神的话，他就必后悔，不将所说的灾祸降与你们。
chapters.en: Therefore now amend your ways and your doings, and obey the voice of the LORD your God; and the LORD will repent him of the evil that he hath pronounced against you.

chapters.zh: 至于我，我在你们手中，你们眼看何为善，何为正，就那样待我罢！
chapters.en: As for me, behold, I in your hand: do with me as seemeth good and meet unto you.

chapters.zh: 但你们要确实地知道，若把我治死，就使无辜人的血归到你们和这城，并其中的居民了；因为耶和华实在差遣我到你们这著来，将这一切话传与你们耳中。
chapters.en: But know ye for certain, that if ye put me to death, ye shall surely bring innocent blood upon yourselves, and upon this city, and upon the inhabitants thereof: for of a truth the LORD hath sent me unto you to speak all these words in your ears.

chapters.zh: 首领和众民就对祭司、先知说：这人是不该死的，因为他是奉耶和华 ─ 我们神的名向我们说话。
chapters.en: Then said the princes and all the people unto the priests and to the prophets; This man not worthy to die: for he hath spoken to us in the name of the LORD our God.

chapters.zh: 国中的长老就有几个人起来，对聚会的众民说：
chapters.en: Then rose up certain of the elders of the land, and spake to all the assembly of the people, saying,

chapters.zh: 当犹大王希西家的日子，有摩利沙人弥迦对犹大众人预言说：万军之耶和华如此说：锡安必被耕种像一块田；耶路撒冷必变为乱堆；这殿的山必像丛林的高处。
chapters.en: Micah the Morasthite prophesied in the days of Hezekiah king of Judah, and spake to all the people of Judah, saying, Thus saith the LORD of hosts; Zion shall be plowed a field, and Jerusalem shall become heaps, and the mountain of the house as the high places of a forest.

chapters.zh: 犹大王希西家和犹大众人岂是把他治死呢？希西家岂不是敬畏耶和华、恳求他的恩么？耶和华就后悔，不把自己所说的灾祸降与他们。若治死这人，我们就作了大恶，自害己命。
chapters.en: Did Hezekiah king of Judah and all Judah put him at all to death? did he not fear the LORD, and besought the LORD, and the LORD repented him of the evil which he had pronounced against them? Thus might we procure great evil against our souls.

chapters.zh: （又有一个人奉耶和华的名说预言，是基列耶琳人示玛雅的儿子乌利亚，他照耶利米的一切话说预言，攻击这城和这地。
chapters.en: And there was also a man that prophesied in the name of the LORD, Urijah the son of Shemaiah of Kirjathjearim, who prophesied against this city and against this land according to all the words of Jeremiah:

chapters.zh: 约雅敬王和他众勇士、众首领听见了乌利亚的话，王就想要把他治死。乌利亚听见就惧怕，逃往埃及去了。
chapters.en: And when Jehoiakim the king, with all his mighty men, and all the princes, heard his words, the king sought to put him to death: but when Urijah heard it, he was afraid, and fled, and went into Egypt;

chapters.zh: 约雅敬王便打发亚革波的儿子以利拿单，带领几个人往埃及去。
chapters.en: And Jehoiakim the king sent men into Egypt, , Elnathan the son of Achbor, and men with him into Egypt.

chapters.zh: 他们就从埃及将乌利亚带出来，送到约雅敬王那里；王用刀杀了他，把他的尸首抛在平民的坟地中。）
chapters.en: And they fetched forth Urijah out of Egypt, and brought him unto Jehoiakim the king; who slew him with the sword, and cast his dead body into the graves of the common people.

chapters.zh: 然而，沙番的儿子亚希甘保护耶利米，不交在百姓的手中治死他。
chapters.en: Nevertheless the hand of Ahikam the son of Shaphan was with Jeremiah, that they should not give him into the hand of the people to put him to death.

chapters.zh: 犹大王约西亚的儿子约雅敬（约雅敬是西底家的别名，看第三节）登基的时候，有这话从耶和华临到耶利米说：
chapters.en: In the beginning of the reign of Jehoiakim the son of Josiah king of Judah came this word unto Jeremiah from the LORD, saying,

chapters.zh: 耶和华对我如此说：你做绳索与轭，加在自己的颈项上，
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD to me; Make thee bonds and yokes, and put them upon thy neck,

chapters.zh: 藉那些来到耶路撒冷见犹大王西底家的使臣之手，把绳索与轭送到以东王、摩押王、亚扪王、推罗王、西顿王那里，
chapters.en: And send them to the king of Edom, and to the king of Moab, and to the king of the Ammonites, and to the king of Tyrus, and to the king of Zidon, by the hand of the messengers which come to Jerusalem unto Zedekiah king of Judah;

chapters.zh: 且嘱咐使臣，传与他们的主人说，万军之耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：
chapters.en: And command them to say unto their masters, Thus saith the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel; Thus shall ye say unto your masters;

chapters.zh: 我用大能和伸出来的膀臂，创造大地和地上的人民、牲畜。我看给谁相宜，就把地给谁。
chapters.en: I have made the earth, the man and the beast that upon the ground, by my great power and by my outstretched arm, and have given it unto whom it seemed meet unto me.

chapters.zh: 现在我将这些地都交给我仆人巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒的手，我也将田野的走兽给他使用。
chapters.en: And now have I given all these lands into the hand of Nebuchadnezzar the king of Babylon, my servant; and the beasts of the field have I given him also to serve him.

chapters.zh: 列国都必服事他和他的儿孙，直到他本国遭报的日期来到。那时，多国和大君王要使他作他们的奴仆。
chapters.en: And all nations shall serve him, and his son, and his son's son, until the very time of his land come: and then many nations and great kings shall serve themselves of him.

chapters.zh: 无论哪一邦哪一国，不肯服事这巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒，也不把颈项放在巴比伦王的轭下，我必用刀剑、饥荒、瘟疫刑罚那邦，直到我藉巴比伦王的手将他们毁灭。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: And it shall come to pass, the nation and kingdom which will not serve the same Nebuchadnezzar the king of Babylon, and that will not put their neck under the yoke of the king of Babylon, that nation will I punish, saith the LORD, with the sword, and with the famine, and with the pestilence, until I have consumed them by his hand.

chapters.zh: 至于你们，不可听从你们的先知和占卜的、圆梦的、观兆的，以及行邪术的；他们告诉你们说：你们不致服事巴比伦王。
chapters.en: Therefore hearken not ye to your prophets, nor to your diviners, nor to your dreamers, nor to your enchanters, nor to your sorcerers, which speak unto you, saying, Ye shall not serve the king of Babylon:

chapters.zh: 他们向你们说假预言，要叫你们迁移，远离本地，以致我将你们赶出去，使你们灭亡。
chapters.en: For they prophesy a lie unto you, to remove you far from your land; and that I should drive you out, and ye should perish.

chapters.zh: 但哪一邦肯把颈项放在巴比伦王的轭下服事他，我必使那邦仍在本地存留，得以耕种居住。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: But the nations that bring their neck under the yoke of the king of Babylon, and serve him, those will I let remain still in their own land, saith the LORD; and they shall till it, and dwell therein.

chapters.zh: 我就照这一切的话对犹大王西底家说：要把你们的颈项放在巴比伦王的轭下，服事他和他的百姓，便得存活。
chapters.en: I spake also to Zedekiah king of Judah according to all these words, saying, Bring your necks under the yoke of the king of Babylon, and serve him and his people, and live.

chapters.zh: 你和你的百姓为何要因刀剑、饥荒、瘟疫死亡，正如耶和华论到不服事巴比伦王的那国说的话呢？
chapters.en: Why will ye die, thou and thy people, by the sword, by the famine, and by the pestilence, as the LORD hath spoken against the nation that will not serve the king of Babylon?

chapters.zh: 不可听那些先知对你们所说的话；他们说：你们不致服事巴比伦王，其实他们向你们说假预言。
chapters.en: Therefore hearken not unto the words of the prophets that speak unto you, saying, Ye shall not serve the king of Babylon: for they prophesy a lie unto you.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：我并没有打发他们，他们却托我的名说假预言，好使我将你们和向你们说预言的那些先知赶出去，一同灭亡。
chapters.en: For I have not sent them, saith the LORD, yet they prophesy a lie in my name; that I might drive you out, and that ye might perish, ye, and the prophets that prophesy unto you.

chapters.zh: 我又对祭司和这众民说：耶和华如此说：你们不可听那先知对你们所说的预言。他们说：耶和华殿中的器皿快要从巴比伦带回来；其实他们向你们说假预言。
chapters.en: Also I spake to the priests and to all this people, saying, Thus saith the LORD; Hearken not to the words of your prophets that prophesy unto you, saying, Behold, the vessels of the LORD'S house shall now shortly be brought again from Babylon: for they prophesy a lie unto you.

chapters.zh: 不可听从他们，只管服事巴比伦王便得存活。这城何致变为荒场呢？
chapters.en: Hearken not unto them; serve the king of Babylon, and live: wherefore should this city be laid waste?

chapters.zh: 他们若果是先知，有耶和华的话临到他们，让他们祈求万军之耶和华，使那在耶和华殿中和犹大王宫内，并耶路撒冷剩下的器皿，不被带到巴比伦去。
chapters.en: But if they prophets, and if the word of the LORD be with them, let them now make intercession to the LORD of hosts, that the vessels which are left in the house of the LORD, and the house of the king of Judah, and at Jerusalem, go not to Babylon.

chapters.zh: （因为万军之耶和华论到柱子、铜海、盆座，并剩在这城里的器皿，
chapters.en: For thus saith the LORD of hosts concerning the pillars, and concerning the sea, and concerning the bases, and concerning the residue of the vessels that remain in this city,

chapters.zh: 就是巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒掳掠犹大王约雅敬的儿子耶哥尼雅，和犹大、耶路撒冷一切贵胄的时候所没有掠去的器皿。）
chapters.en: Which Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon took not, when he carried away captive Jeconiah the son of Jehoiakim king of Judah from Jerusalem to Babylon, and all the nobles of Judah and Jerusalem;

chapters.zh: 论到那在耶和华殿中和犹大王宫内，并耶路撒冷剩下的器皿，万军之耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：
chapters.en: Yea, thus saith the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel, concerning the vessels that remain the house of the LORD, and the house of the king of Judah and of Jerusalem;

chapters.zh: 必被带到巴比伦存在那里，直到我眷顾以色列人的日子。那时，我必将这器皿带回来，交还此地。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: They shall be carried to Babylon, and there shall they be until the day that I visit them, saith the LORD; then will I bring them up, and restore them to this place.

chapters.zh: 当年，就是犹大王西底家登基第四年五月，基遍人押朔的儿子，先知哈拿尼雅，在耶和华的殿中当著祭司和众民对我说：
chapters.en: And it came to pass the same year, in the beginning of the reign of Zedekiah king of Judah, in the fourth year, in the fifth month, Hananiah the son of Azur the prophet, which of Gibeon, spake unto me in the house of the LORD, in the presence of the priests and of all the people, saying,

chapters.zh: 万军之耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：我已经折断巴比伦王的轭。
chapters.en: Thus speaketh the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel, saying, I have broken the yoke of the king of Babylon.

chapters.zh: 二年之内，我要将巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒从这地掠到巴比伦的器皿，就是耶和华殿中的一切器皿都带回此地。
chapters.en: Within two full years will I bring again into this place all the vessels of the LORD'S house, that Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon took away from this place, and carried them to Babylon:

chapters.zh: 我又要将犹大王约雅敬的儿子耶哥尼雅和被掳到巴比伦去的一切犹大人带回此地，因为我要折断巴比伦王的轭。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: And I will bring again to this place Jeconiah the son of Jehoiakim king of Judah, with all the captives of Judah, that went into Babylon, saith the LORD: for I will break the yoke of the king of Babylon.

chapters.zh: 先知耶利米当著祭司和站在耶和华殿里的众民对先知哈拿尼雅说：
chapters.en: Then the prophet Jeremiah said unto the prophet Hananiah in the presence of the priests, and in the presence of all the people that stood in the house of the LORD,

chapters.zh: 阿们！愿耶和华如此行，愿耶和华成就你所预言的话，将耶和华殿中的器皿和一切被掳去的人从巴比伦带回此地。
chapters.en: Even the prophet Jeremiah said, Amen: the LORD do so: the LORD perform thy words which thou hast prophesied, to bring again the vessels of the LORD'S house, and all that is carried away captive, from Babylon into this place.

chapters.zh: 然而我向你和众民耳中所要说的话，你应当听。
chapters.en: Nevertheless hear thou now this word that I speak in thine ears, and in the ears of all the people;

chapters.zh: 从古以来，在你我以前的先知，向多国和大邦说预言，论到争战、灾祸、瘟疫的事。
chapters.en: The prophets that have been before me and before thee of old prophesied both against many countries, and against great kingdoms, of war, and of evil, and of pestilence.

chapters.zh: 先知预言的平安，到话语成就的时候，人便知道他真是耶和华所差来的。
chapters.en: The prophet which prophesieth of peace, when the word of the prophet shall come to pass, shall the prophet be known, that the LORD hath truly sent him.

chapters.zh: 于是，先知哈拿尼雅将先知耶利米颈项上的轭取下来，折断了。
chapters.en: Then Hananiah the prophet took the yoke from off the prophet Jeremiah's neck, and brake it.

chapters.zh: 哈拿尼雅又当著众民说：耶和华如此说：二年之内我必照样从列国人的颈项上折断巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒的轭。于是先知耶利米就走了。
chapters.en: And Hananiah spake in the presence of all the people, saying, Thus saith the LORD; Even so will I break the yoke of Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon from the neck of all nations within the space of two full years. And the prophet Jeremiah went his way.

chapters.zh: 先知哈拿尼雅把先知耶利米颈项上的轭折断以后，耶和华的话临到耶利米说：
chapters.en: Then the word of the LORD came unto Jeremiah , after that Hananiah the prophet had broken the yoke from off the neck of the prophet Jeremiah, saying,

chapters.zh: 你去告诉哈拿尼雅说，耶和华如此说：你折断木轭，却换了铁轭！
chapters.en: Go and tell Hananiah, saying, Thus saith the LORD; Thou hast broken the yokes of wood; but thou shalt make for them yokes of iron.

chapters.zh: 因为万军之耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：我已将铁轭加在这些国的颈项上，使他们服事巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒，他们总要服事他；我也把田野的走兽给了他。
chapters.en: For thus saith the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel; I have put a yoke of iron upon the neck of all these nations, that they may serve Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon; and they shall serve him: and I have given him the beasts of the field also.

chapters.zh: 于是先知耶利米对先知哈拿尼雅说：哈拿尼雅啊，你应当听！耶和华并没有差遣你，你竟使这百姓倚靠谎言。
chapters.en: Then said the prophet Jeremiah unto Hananiah the prophet, Hear now, Hananiah; The LORD hath not sent thee; but thou makest this people to trust in a lie.

chapters.zh: 所以耶和华如此说：看哪，我要叫你去世，你今年必死，因为你向耶和华说了叛逆的话。
chapters.en: Therefore thus saith the LORD; Behold, I will cast thee from off the face of the earth: this year thou shalt die, because thou hast taught rebellion against the LORD.

chapters.zh: 这样，先知哈拿尼雅当年七月间就死了。
chapters.en: So Hananiah the prophet died the same year in the seventh month.

chapters.zh: 先知耶利米从耶路撒冷寄信与被掳的祭司、先知，和众民，并生存的长老，就是尼布甲尼撒从耶路撒冷掳到巴比伦去的。
chapters.en: Now these the words of the letter that Jeremiah the prophet sent from Jerusalem unto the residue of the elders which were carried away captives, and to the priests, and to the prophets, and to all the people whom Nebuchadnezzar had carried away captive from Jerusalem to Babylon;

chapters.zh: （这在耶哥尼雅王和太后、太监，并犹大、耶路撒冷的首领，以及工匠、铁匠都离了耶路撒冷以后。）
chapters.en: (After that Jeconiah the king, and the queen, and the eunuchs, the princes of Judah and Jerusalem, and the carpenters, and the smiths, were departed from Jerusalem;)

chapters.zh: 他藉沙番的儿子以利亚萨和希勒家的儿子基玛利的手寄去。他们二人是犹大王西底家打发往巴比伦去见尼布甲尼撒王的。
chapters.en: By the hand of Elasah the son of Shaphan, and Gemariah the son of Hilkiah, (whom Zedekiah king of Judah sent unto Babylon to Nebuchadnezzar king of Babylon) saying,

chapters.zh: 信上说：万军之耶和华 ─ 以色列的神对一切被掳去的（就是我使他们从耶路撒冷被掳到巴比伦的人）如此说：
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel, unto all that are carried away captives, whom I have caused to be carried away from Jerusalem unto Babylon;

chapters.zh: 你们要盖造房屋，住在其中；栽种田园，吃其中所产的；
chapters.en: Build ye houses, and dwell ; and plant gardens, and eat the fruit of them;

chapters.zh: 娶妻生儿女，为你们的儿子娶妻，使你们的女儿嫁人，生儿养女。在那 � 生养众多，不致减少。
chapters.en: Take ye wives, and beget sons and daughters; and take wives for your sons, and give your daughters to husbands, that they may bear sons and daughters; that ye may be increased there, and not diminished.

chapters.zh: 我所使你们被掳到的那城，你们要为那城求平安，为那城祷告耶和华；因为那城得平安，你们也随著得平安。
chapters.en: And seek the peace of the city whither I have caused you to be carried away captives, and pray unto the LORD for it: for in the peace thereof shall ye have peace.

chapters.zh: 万军之耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：不要被你们中间的先知和占卜的诱惑，也不要听信自己所做的梦；
chapters.en: For thus saith the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel; Let not your prophets and your diviners, that in the midst of you, deceive you, neither hearken to your dreams which ye cause to be dreamed.

chapters.zh: 因为他们托我的名对你们说假预言，我并没有差遣他们。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: For they prophesy falsely unto you in my name: I have not sent them, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 耶和华如此说：为巴比伦所定的七十年满了以后，我要眷顾你们，向你们成就我的恩言，使你们仍回此地。
chapters.en: For thus saith the LORD, That after seventy years be accomplished at Babylon I will visit you, and perform my good word toward you, in causing you to return to this place.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：我知道我向你们所怀的意念是赐平安的意念，不是降灾祸的意念，要叫你们末后有指望。
chapters.en: For I know the thoughts that I think toward you, saith the LORD, thoughts of peace, and not of evil, to give you an expected end.

chapters.zh: 你们要呼求我，祷告我，我就应允你们。
chapters.en: Then shall ye call upon me, and ye shall go and pray unto me, and I will hearken unto you.

chapters.zh: 你们寻求我，若专心寻求我，就必寻见。
chapters.en: And ye shall seek me, and find , when ye shall search for me with all your heart.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：我必被你们寻见，我也必使你们被掳的人归回，将你们从各国中和我所赶你们到的各处招聚了来，又将你们带回我使你们被掳掠离开的地方。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: And I will be found of you, saith the LORD: and I will turn away your captivity, and I will gather you from all the nations, and from all the places whither I have driven you, saith the LORD; and I will bring you again into the place whence I caused you to be carried away captive.

chapters.zh: 你们说：耶和华在巴比伦为我们兴起先知；
chapters.en: Because ye have said, The LORD hath raised us up prophets in Babylon;

chapters.zh: 所以耶和华论到坐大卫宝座的王和住在这城里的一切百姓，就是未曾与你们一同被掳的弟兄，
chapters.en: that thus saith the LORD of the king that sitteth upon the throne of David, and of all the people that dwelleth in this city, of your brethren that are not gone forth with you into captivity;

chapters.zh: 万军之耶和华如此说：看哪，我必使刀剑、饥荒、瘟疫临到他们，使他们像极坏的无花果，坏得不可吃。
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD of hosts; Behold, I will send upon them the sword, the famine, and the pestilence, and will make them like vile figs, that cannot be eaten, they are so evil.

chapters.zh: 我必用刀剑、饥荒、瘟疫追赶他们，使他们在天下万国抛来抛去，在我所赶他们到的各国中，令人咒诅、惊骇、嗤笑、羞辱。
chapters.en: And I will persecute them with the sword, with the famine, and with the pestilence, and will deliver them to be removed to all the kingdoms of the earth, to be a curse, and an astonishment, and an hissing, and a reproach, among all the nations whither I have driven them:

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：这是因为他们没有听从我的话，就是我从早起来差遣我仆人众先知去说的，无奈他们不听。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: Because they have not hearkened to my words, saith the LORD, which I sent unto them by my servants the prophets, rising up early and sending ; but ye would not hear, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 所以你们一切被掳去的，就是我从耶路撒冷打发到巴比伦去的，当听耶和华的话。
chapters.en: Hear ye therefore the word of the LORD, all ye of the captivity, whom I have sent from Jerusalem to Babylon:

chapters.zh: 万军之耶和华 ─ 以色列的神论到哥赖雅的儿子亚哈，并玛西雅的儿子西底家，如此说：他们是托我名向你们说假预言的，我必将他们交在巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒的手中；他要在你们眼前杀害他们。
