chapters.en: And it came to pass after ten days, that the word of the LORD came unto Jeremiah.

chapters.zh: 他就将加利亚的儿子约哈难和同著他的众军长，并众百姓，从最小的到至大的都叫了来，
chapters.en: Then called he Johanan the son of Kareah, and all the captains of the forces which with him, and all the people from the least even to the greatest,

chapters.zh: 对他们说：耶和华 ─ 以色列的神，就是你们请我在他面前为你们祈求的主，如此说：
chapters.en: And said unto them, Thus saith the LORD, the God of Israel, unto whom ye sent me to present your supplication before him;

chapters.zh: 你们若仍住在这地，我就建立你们，必不拆毁，栽植你们，并不拔出，因我为降与你们的灾祸后悔了。
chapters.en: If ye will still abide in this land, then will I build you, and not pull down, and I will plant you, and not pluck up: for I repent me of the evil that I have done unto you.

chapters.zh: 不要怕你们所怕的巴比伦王。耶和华说：不要怕他！因为我与你们同在，要拯救你们脱离他的手。
chapters.en: Be not afraid of the king of Babylon, of whom ye are afraid; be not afraid of him, saith the LORD: for I with you to save you, and to deliver you from his hand.

chapters.zh: 我也要使他发怜悯，好怜悯你们，叫你们归回本地。
chapters.en: And I will shew mercies unto you, that he may have mercy upon you, and cause you to return to your own land.

chapters.zh: 倘若你们说：我们不住在这地，以致不听从耶和华 ─ 你们神的话，
chapters.en: But if ye say, We will not dwell in this land, neither obey the voice of the LORD your God,

chapters.zh: 说：我们不住这地，却要进入埃及地，在那里看不见争战，听不见角声，也不致无食饥饿。我们必住在那里。
chapters.en: Saying, No; but we will go into the land of Egypt, where we shall see no war, nor hear the sound of the trumpet, nor have hunger of bread; and there will we dwell:

chapters.zh: 你们所剩下的犹大人哪，现在要听耶和华的话。万军之耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：你们若定意要进入埃及，在那里寄居，
chapters.en: And now therefore hear the word of the LORD, ye remnant of Judah; Thus saith the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel; If ye wholly set your faces to enter into Egypt, and go to sojourn there;

chapters.zh: 你们所惧怕的刀剑在埃及地必追上你们！你们所惧怕的饥荒在埃及要紧紧地跟随你们！你们必死在那里！
chapters.en: Then it shall come to pass, the sword, which ye feared, shall overtake you there in the land of Egypt, and the famine, whereof ye were afraid, shall follow close after you there in Egypt; and there ye shall die.

chapters.zh: 凡定意要进入埃及在那里寄居的必遭刀剑、饥荒、瘟疫而死，无一人存留，逃脱我所降与他们的灾祸。
chapters.en: So shall it be with all the men that set their faces to go into Egypt to sojourn there; they shall die by the sword, by the famine, and by the pestilence: and none of them shall remain or escape from the evil that I will bring upon them.

chapters.zh: 万军之耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：我怎样将我的怒气和忿怒倾在耶路撒冷的居民身上，你们进入埃及的时候，我也必照样将我的忿怒倾在你们身上，以致你们令人辱骂、惊骇、咒诅、羞辱，你们不得再见这地方。
chapters.en: For thus saith the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel; As mine anger and my fury hath been poured forth upon the inhabitants of Jerusalem; so shall my fury be poured forth upon you, when ye shall enter into Egypt: and ye shall be an execration, and an astonishment, and a curse, and a reproach; and ye shall see this place no more.

chapters.zh: 所剩下的犹大人哪，耶和华论到你们说：不要进入埃及去。你们要确实地知道我今日警教你们了。
chapters.en: The LORD hath said concerning you, O ye remnant of Judah; Go ye not into Egypt: know certainly that I have admonished you this day.

chapters.zh: 你们行诡诈自害；因为你们请我到耶和华 ─ 你们的神那里，说：求你为我们祷告耶和华 ─ 我们神，照耶和华 ─ 我们的神一切所说的告诉我们，我们就必遵行。
chapters.en: For ye dissembled in your hearts, when ye sent me unto the LORD your God, saying, Pray for us unto the LORD our God; and according unto all that the LORD our God shall say, so declare unto us, and we will do .

chapters.zh: 我今日将这话告诉你们，耶和华 ─ 你们的神为你们的事差遣我到你们那里说的，你们却一样没有听从。
chapters.en: And I have this day declared to you; but ye have not obeyed the voice of the LORD your God, nor any for the which he hath sent me unto you.

chapters.zh: 现在你们要确实地知道，你们在所要去寄居之地必遭刀剑、饥荒、瘟疫而死。
chapters.en: Now therefore know certainly that ye shall die by the sword, by the famine, and by the pestilence, in the place whither ye desire to go to sojourn.

chapters.zh: 耶利米向众百姓说完了耶和华 ─ 他们神的一切话，就是耶和华 ─ 他们神差遣他去所说的一切话。
chapters.en: And it came to pass, when Jeremiah had made an end of speaking unto all the people all the words of the LORD their God, for which the LORD their God had sent him to them, all these words,

chapters.zh: 何沙雅的儿子亚撒利雅和加利亚的儿子约哈难，并一切狂傲的人，就对耶利米说：你说谎言！耶和华 ─ 我们的神并没有差遣你来说：你们不可进入埃及，在那里寄居。
chapters.en: Then spake Azariah the son of Hoshaiah, and Johanan the son of Kareah, and all the proud men, saying unto Jeremiah, Thou speakest falsely: the LORD our God hath not sent thee to say, Go not into Egypt to sojourn there:

chapters.zh: 这是尼利亚的儿子巴录挑唆你害我们，要将我们交在迦勒底人的手中，使我们有被杀的，有被掳到巴比伦去的。
chapters.en: But Baruch the son of Neriah setteth thee on against us, for to deliver us into the hand of the Chaldeans, that they might put us to death, and carry us away captives into Babylon.

chapters.zh: 于是加利亚的儿子约哈难和一切军长，并众百姓，不听从耶和华的话住在犹大地。
chapters.en: So Johanan the son of Kareah, and all the captains of the forces, and all the people, obeyed not the voice of the LORD, to dwell in the land of Judah.

chapters.zh: 加利亚的儿子约哈难和一切军长却将所剩下的犹大人，就是从被赶到各国回来在犹大地寄居的男人、妇女、孩童，和众公主，并护卫长尼布撒拉旦所留在沙番的孙子亚希甘的儿子基大利那里的众人，与先知耶利米，以及尼利亚的儿子巴录，
chapters.en: But Johanan the son of Kareah, and all the captains of the forces, took all the remnant of Judah, that were returned from all nations, whither they had been driven, to dwell in the land of Judah;

chapters.zh: a
chapters.en: men, and women, and children, and the king's daughters, and every person that Nebuzaradan the captain of the guard had left with Gedaliah the son of Ahikam the son of Shaphan, and Jeremiah the prophet, and Baruch the son of Neriah.

chapters.zh: 都带入埃及地，到了答比匿。这是因他们不听从耶和华的话。
chapters.en: So they came into the land of Egypt: for they obeyed not the voice of the LORD: thus came they to Tahpanhes.

chapters.zh: 在答比匿，耶和华的话临到耶利米说：
chapters.en: Then came the word of the LORD unto Jeremiah in Tahpanhes, saying,

chapters.zh: 你在犹大人眼前要用手拿几块大石头，藏在砌砖的灰泥中，就是在答比匿法老的宫门那里，
chapters.en: Take great stones in thine hand, and hide them in the clay in the brickkiln, which at the entry of Pharaoh's house in Tahpanhes, in the sight of the men of Judah;

chapters.zh: 对他们说：万军之耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：我必召我的仆人巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒来。在所藏的石头上我要安置他的宝座；他必将光华的宝帐支搭在其上。
chapters.en: And say unto them, Thus saith the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel; Behold, I will send and take Nebuchadrezzar the king of Babylon, my servant, and will set his throne upon these stones that I have hid; and he shall spread his royal pavilion over them.

chapters.zh: 他要来攻击埃及地，定为死亡的，必致死亡；定为掳掠的，必被掳掠；定为刀杀的，必交刀杀。
chapters.en: And when he cometh, he shall smite the land of Egypt, such for death to death; and such for captivity to captivity; and such for the sword to the sword.

chapters.zh: 我要在埃及神的庙中使火著起，巴比伦王要将庙宇焚烧，神像掳去；他要得（原文是披上）埃及地，好像牧人披上外衣，从那里安然而去。
chapters.en: And I will kindle a fire in the houses of the gods of Egypt; and he shall burn them, and carry them away captives: and he shall array himself with the land of Egypt, as a shepherd putteth on his garment; and he shall go forth from thence in peace.

chapters.zh: 他必打碎埃及地伯示麦的柱像，用火焚烧埃及神的庙宇。
chapters.en: He shall break also the images of Bethshemesh, that in the land of Egypt; and the houses of the gods of the Egyptians shall he burn with fire.

chapters.zh: 有临到耶利米的话，论及一切住在埃及地的犹大人，就是住在密夺、答比匿、挪弗、巴忒罗境内的犹大人，说：
chapters.en: The word that came to Jeremiah concerning all the Jews which dwell in the land of Egypt, which dwell at Migdol, and at Tahpanhes, and at Noph, and in the country of Pathros, saying,

chapters.zh: 万军之耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：我所降与耶路撒冷和犹大各城的一切灾祸你们都看见了。那些城邑今日荒凉，无人居住；
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel; Ye have seen all the evil that I have brought upon Jerusalem, and upon all the cities of Judah; and, behold, this day they a desolation, and no man dwelleth therein,

chapters.zh: 这是因居民所行的恶，去烧香事奉别神，就是他们和你们，并你们列祖所不认识的神，惹我发怒。
chapters.en: Because of their wickedness which they have committed to provoke me to anger, in that they went to burn incense, to serve other gods, whom they knew not, they, ye, nor your fathers.

chapters.zh: 我从早起来差遣我的仆人众先知去说，你们切不要行我所厌恶这可憎之事。
chapters.en: Howbeit I sent unto you all my servants the prophets, rising early and sending , saying, Oh, do not this abominable thing that I hate.

chapters.zh: 他们却不听从，不侧耳而听，不转离恶事，仍向别神烧香。
chapters.en: But they hearkened not, nor inclined their ear to turn from their wickedness, to burn no incense unto other gods.

chapters.zh: 因此，我的怒气和忿怒都倒出来，在犹大城邑中和耶路撒冷的街市上，如火著起，以致都荒废凄凉，正如今日一样。
chapters.en: Wherefore my fury and mine anger was poured forth, and was kindled in the cities of Judah and in the streets of Jerusalem; and they are wasted desolate, as at this day.

chapters.zh: 现在耶和华 ─ 万军之神、以色列的神如此说：你们为何作这大恶自害己命，使你们的男人、妇女、婴孩，和吃奶的都从犹大中剪除、不留一人呢？
chapters.en: Therefore now thus saith the LORD, the God of hosts, the God of Israel; Wherefore commit ye great evil against your souls, to cut off from you man and woman, child and suckling, out of Judah, to leave you none to remain;

chapters.zh: 就是因你们手所做的，在所去寄居的埃及地向别神烧香惹我发怒，使你们被剪除，在天下万国中令人咒诅羞辱。
chapters.en: In that ye provoke me unto wrath with the works of your hands, burning incense unto other gods in the land of Egypt, whither ye be gone to dwell, that ye might cut yourselves off, and that ye might be a curse and a reproach among all the nations of the earth?

chapters.zh: 你们列祖的恶行，犹大列王和他们后妃的恶行，你们自己和你们妻子的恶行，就是在犹大地、耶路撒冷街上所行的，你们都忘了么？
chapters.en: Have ye forgotten the wickedness of your fathers, and the wickedness of the kings of Judah, and the wickedness of their wives, and your own wickedness, and the wickedness of your wives, which they have committed in the land of Judah, and in the streets of Jerusalem?

chapters.zh: 到如今还没有懊悔，没有惧怕，没有遵行我在你们和你们列祖面前所设立的法度律例。
chapters.en: They are not humbled unto this day, neither have they feared, nor walked in my law, nor in my statutes, that I set before you and before your fathers.

chapters.zh: 所以万军之耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：我必向你们变脸降灾，以致剪除犹大众人。
chapters.en: Therefore thus saith the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel; Behold, I will set my face against you for evil, and to cut off all Judah.

chapters.zh: 那定意进入埃及地、在那里寄居的，就是所剩下的犹大人，我必使他们尽都灭绝，必在埃及地仆倒，必因刀剑饥荒灭绝；从最小的到至大的都必遭刀剑饥荒而死，以致令人辱骂、惊骇、咒诅、羞辱。
chapters.en: And I will take the remnant of Judah, that have set their faces to go into the land of Egypt to sojourn there, and they shall all be consumed, fall in the land of Egypt; they shall be consumed by the sword by the famine: they shall die, from the least even unto the greatest, by the sword and by the famine: and they shall be an execration, an astonishment, and a curse, and a reproach.

chapters.zh: 我怎样用刀剑、饥荒、瘟疫刑罚耶路撒冷，也必照样刑罚那些住在埃及地的犹大人；
chapters.en: For I will punish them that dwell in the land of Egypt, as I have punished Jerusalem, by the sword, by the famine, and by the pestilence:

chapters.zh: 甚至那进入埃及地寄居的，就是所剩下的犹大人，都不得逃脱，也不得存留归回犹大地。他们心中甚想归回居住之地；除了逃脱的以外，一个都不能归回。
chapters.en: So that none of the remnant of Judah, which are gone into the land of Egypt to sojourn there, shall escape or remain, that they should return into the land of Judah, to the which they have a desire to return to dwell there: for none shall return but such as shall escape.

chapters.zh: 那些住在埃及地巴忒罗知道自己妻子向别神烧香的，与旁边站立的众妇女，聚集成群，回答耶利米说：
chapters.en: Then all the men which knew that their wives had burned incense unto other gods, and all the women that stood by, a great multitude, even all the people that dwelt in the land of Egypt, in Pathros, answered Jeremiah, saying,

chapters.zh: 论到你奉耶和华的名向我们所说的话，我们必不听从。
chapters.en: the word that thou hast spoken unto us in the name of the LORD, we will not hearken unto thee.

chapters.zh: 我们定要成就我们口中所出的一切话，向天后烧香、浇奠祭，按著我们与我们列祖、君王、首领在犹大的城邑中和耶路撒冷的街市上素常所行的一样；因为那时我们吃饱饭、享福乐，并不见灾祸。
chapters.en: But we will certainly do whatsoever thing goeth forth out of our own mouth, to burn incense unto the queen of heaven, and to pour out drink offerings unto her, as we have done, we, and our fathers, our kings, and our princes, in the cities of Judah, and in the streets of Jerusalem: for had we plenty of victuals, and were well, and saw no evil.

chapters.zh: 自从我们停止向天后烧香、浇奠祭，我们倒缺乏一切，又因刀剑饥荒灭绝。
chapters.en: But since we left off to burn incense to the queen of heaven, and to pour out drink offerings unto her, we have wanted all , and have been consumed by the sword and by the famine.

chapters.zh: 妇女说：我们向天后烧香、浇奠祭，做天后像的饼供奉他，向他浇奠祭，是外乎我们的丈夫么？
chapters.en: And when we burned incense to the queen of heaven, and poured out drink offerings unto her, did we make her cakes to worship her, and pour out drink offerings unto her, without our men?

chapters.zh: 耶利米对一切那样回答他的男人妇女说：
chapters.en: Then Jeremiah said unto all the people, to the men, and to the women, and to all the people which had given him answer, saying,

chapters.zh: 你们与你们列祖、君王、首领，并国内的百姓，在犹大城邑中和耶路撒冷街市上所烧的香，耶和华岂不记念，心中岂不思想么？
chapters.en: The incense that ye burned in the cities of Judah, and in the streets of Jerusalem, ye, and your fathers, your kings, and your princes, and the people of the land, did not the LORD remember them, and came it into his mind?

chapters.zh: 耶和华因你们所作的恶、所行可憎的事，不能再容忍，所以你们的地荒凉，令人惊骇咒诅，无人居住，正如今日一样。
chapters.en: So that the LORD could no longer bear, because of the evil of your doings, because of the abominations which ye have committed; therefore is your land a desolation, and an astonishment, and a curse, without an inhabitant, as at this day.

chapters.zh: 你们烧香，得罪耶和华，没有听从他的话，没有遵行他的律法、条例、法度，所以你们遭遇这灾祸，正如今日一样。
chapters.en: Because ye have burned incense, and because ye have sinned against the LORD, and have not obeyed the voice of the LORD, nor walked in his law, nor in his statutes, nor in his testimonies; therefore this evil is happened unto you, as at this day.

chapters.zh: 耶利米又对众民和众妇女说：你们在埃及地的一切犹大人当听耶和华的话。
chapters.en: Moreover Jeremiah said unto all the people, and to all the women, Hear the word of the LORD, all Judah that in the land of Egypt:

chapters.zh: 万军之耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：你们和你们的妻都口中说、手里做，说：我们定要偿还所许的愿，向天后烧香、浇奠祭。现在你们只管坚定所许的愿而偿还罢！
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel, saying; Ye and your wives have both spoken with your mouths, and fulfilled with your hand, saying, We will surely perform our vows that we have vowed, to burn incense to the queen of heaven, and to pour out drink offerings unto her: ye will surely accomplish your vows, and surely perform your vows.

chapters.zh: 所以你们住在埃及地的一切犹大人当听耶和华的话。耶和华说：我指著我的大名起誓，在埃及全地，我的名不再被犹大一个人的口称呼说：我指著主 ─ 永生的耶和华起誓。
chapters.en: Therefore hear ye the word of the LORD, all Judah that dwell in the land of Egypt; Behold, I have sworn by my great name, saith the LORD, that my name shall no more be named in the mouth of any man of Judah in all the land of Egypt, saying, The Lord GOD liveth.

chapters.zh: 我向他们留意降祸不降福；在埃及地的一切犹大人必因刀剑、饥荒所灭，直到灭尽。
chapters.en: Behold, I will watch over them for evil, and not for good: and all the men of Judah that in the land of Egypt shall be consumed by the sword and by the famine, until there be an end of them.

chapters.zh: 脱离刀剑、从埃及地归回犹大地的人数很少；那进入埃及地要在那里寄居的，就是所剩下的犹大人，必知道是谁的话立得住，是我的话呢？是他们的话呢？
chapters.en: Yet a small number that escape the sword shall return out of the land of Egypt into the land of Judah, and all the remnant of Judah, that are gone into the land of Egypt to sojourn there, shall know whose words shall stand, mine, or theirs.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：我在这地方刑罚你们，必有预兆，使你们知道我降祸与你们的话必要立得住。
chapters.en: And this a sign unto you, saith the LORD, that I will punish you in this place, that ye may know that my words shall surely stand against you for evil:

chapters.zh: 耶和华如此说：我必将埃及王法老合弗拉交在他仇敌和寻索其命的人手中，像我将犹大王西底家交在他仇敌和寻索其命的巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒手中一样。
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD; Behold, I will give Pharaohhophra king of Egypt into the hand of his enemies, and into the hand of them that seek his life; as I gave Zedekiah king of Judah into the hand of Nebuchadrezzar king of Babylon, his enemy, and that sought his life.

chapters.zh: 犹大王约西亚的儿子约雅敬第四年，尼利亚的儿子巴录将先知耶利米口中所说的话写在书上。耶利米说：
chapters.en: The word that Jeremiah the prophet spake unto Baruch the son of Neriah, when he had written these words in a book at the mouth of Jeremiah, in the fourth year of Jehoiakim the son of Josiah king of Judah, saying,

chapters.zh: 巴录啊，耶和华 ─ 以色列的神说：
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD, the God of Israel, unto thee, O Baruch;

chapters.zh: 巴录（原文是你）曾说：哀哉！耶和华将忧愁加在我的痛苦上，我因唉哼而困乏，不得安歇。
chapters.en: Thou didst say, Woe is me now! for the LORD hath added grief to my sorrow; I fainted in my sighing, and I find no rest.

chapters.zh: 你要这样告诉他，耶和华如此说：我所建立的，我必拆毁；我所栽植的，我必拔出；在全地我都如此行。
chapters.en: Thus shalt thou say unto him, The LORD saith thus; Behold, which I have built will I break down, and that which I have planted I will pluck up, even this whole land.

chapters.zh: 你为自己图谋大事么？不要图谋！我必使灾祸临到凡有血气的。但你无论往哪里去，我必使你以自己的命为掠物。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: And seekest thou great things for thyself? seek not: for, behold, I will bring evil upon all flesh, saith the LORD: but thy life will I give unto thee for a prey in all places whither thou goest.

chapters.zh: 耶和华论列国的话临到先知耶利米。
chapters.en: The word of the LORD which came to Jeremiah the prophet against the Gentiles;

chapters.zh: 论到关乎埃及王法老尼哥的军队：这军队安营在伯拉河边的迦基米施，是巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒在犹大王约西亚的儿子约雅敬第四年所打败的。
chapters.en: Against Egypt, against the army of Pharaohnecho king of Egypt, which was by the river Euphrates in Carchemish, which Nebuchadrezzar king of Babylon smote in the fourth year of Jehoiakim the son of Josiah king of Judah.

chapters.zh: 你们要预备大小盾牌，往前上阵。
chapters.en: Order ye the buckler and shield, and draw near to battle.

chapters.zh: 你们套上车，骑上马！顶盔站立，磨枪贯甲！
chapters.en: Harness the horses; and get up, ye horsemen, and stand forth with helmets; furbish the spears, put on the brigandines.

chapters.zh: 我为何看见他们惊惶转身退后呢？他们的勇士打败了，急忙逃跑，并不回头；惊吓四围都有！这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: Wherefore have I seen them dismayed turned away back? and their mighty ones are beaten down, and are fled apace, and look not back: fear round about, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 不要容快跑的逃避；不要容勇士逃脱（或译：快跑的不能逃避；勇士不能逃脱）；他们在北方伯拉河边绊跌仆倒。
chapters.en: Let not the swift flee away, nor the mighty man escape; they shall stumble, and fall toward the north by the river Euphrates.

chapters.zh: 像尼罗河涨发，像江河之水翻腾的是谁呢？
chapters.en: Who this cometh up as a flood, whose waters are moved as the rivers?

chapters.zh: 埃及像尼罗河涨发，像江河的水翻腾。他说：我要涨发遮盖遍地；我要毁灭城邑和其中的居民。
chapters.en: Egypt riseth up like a flood, and waters are moved like the rivers; and he saith, I will go up, will cover the earth; I will destroy the city and the inhabitants thereof.

chapters.zh: 马匹上去罢！车辆急行罢！勇士，就是手拿盾牌的古实人和弗人（又作吕彼亚人），并拉弓的路德族，都出去罢！
chapters.en: Come up, ye horses; and rage, ye chariots; and let the mighty men come forth; the Ethiopians and the Libyans, that handle the shield; and the Lydians, that handle bend the bow.

chapters.zh: 那日是主 ─ 万军之耶和华报仇的日子，要向敌人报仇。刀剑必吞吃得饱，饮血饮足；因为主 ─ 万军之耶和华在北方伯拉河边有献祭的事。
chapters.en: For this the day of the Lord GOD of hosts, a day of vengeance, that he may avenge him of his adversaries: and the sword shall devour, and it shall be satiate and made drunk with their blood: for the Lord GOD of hosts hath a sacrifice in the north country by the river Euphrates.

chapters.zh: 埃及的民（原文是处女）哪，可以上基列取乳香去；你虽多服良药，总是徒然，不得治好。
chapters.en: Go up into Gilead, and take balm, O virgin, the daughter of Egypt: in vain shalt thou use many medicines; thou shalt not be cured.

chapters.zh: 列国听见你的羞辱，遍地满了你的哀声；勇士与勇士彼此相碰，一齐跌倒。
chapters.en: The nations have heard of thy shame, and thy cry hath filled the land: for the mighty man hath stumbled against the mighty, they are fallen both together.

chapters.zh: 耶和华对先知耶利米所说的话，论到巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒要来攻击埃及地：
chapters.en: The word that the LORD spake to Jeremiah the prophet, how Nebuchadrezzar king of Babylon should come smite the land of Egypt.

chapters.zh: 你们要传扬在埃及，宣告在密夺，报告在挪弗、答比匿说：要站起出队，自作准备，因为刀剑在你四围施行吞灭的事。
chapters.en: Declare ye in Egypt, and publish in Migdol, and publish in Noph and in Tahpanhes: say ye, Stand fast, and prepare thee; for the sword shall devour round about thee.

chapters.zh: 你的壮士为何被冲去呢？他们站立不住；因为耶和华驱逐他们，
chapters.en: Why are thy valiant swept away? they stood not, because the LORD did drive them.

chapters.zh: 使多人绊跌；他们也彼此撞倒，说：起来罢！我们再往本民本地去，好躲避欺压的刀剑。
chapters.en: He made many to fall, yea, one fell upon another: and they said, Arise, and let us go again to our own people, and to the land of our nativity, from the oppressing sword.

chapters.zh: 他们在那里喊叫说：埃及王法老不过是个声音（或译：已经败亡）；他已错过所定的时候了。
chapters.en: They did cry there, Pharaoh king of Egypt a noise; he hath passed the time appointed.

chapters.zh: 君王 ─ 名为万军之耶和华的说：我指著我的永生起誓：尼布甲尼撒（原文是他）来的势派必像他泊在众山之中，像迦密在海边一样。
chapters.en: I live, saith the King, whose name the LORD of hosts, Surely as Tabor among the mountains, and as Carmel by the sea, shall he come.

chapters.zh: 住在埃及的民哪（原文是女子），要预备掳去时所用的物件；因为挪弗必成为荒场，且被烧毁，无人居住。
chapters.en: O thou daughter dwelling in Egypt, furnish thyself to go into captivity: for Noph shall be waste and desolate without an inhabitant.

chapters.zh: 埃及是肥美的母牛犊；但出于北方的毁灭（或译：牛虻）来到了！来到了！
chapters.en: Egypt a very fair heifer, destruction cometh; it cometh out of the north.

chapters.zh: 其中的雇勇好像圈里的肥牛犊，他们转身退后，一齐逃跑，站立不住；因为他们遭难的日子、追讨的时候已经临到。
chapters.en: Also her hired men in the midst of her like fatted bullocks; for they also are turned back, are fled away together: they did not stand, because the day of their calamity was come upon them, the time of their visitation.

chapters.zh: 其中的声音好像蛇行一样。敌人要成队而来，如砍伐树木的手拿斧子攻击他。
chapters.en: The voice thereof shall go like a serpent; for they shall march with an army, and come against her with axes, as hewers of wood.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：埃及的树林虽然不能寻察（或译：穿不过），敌人却要砍伐，因他们多于蝗虫，不可胜数。
chapters.en: They shall cut down her forest, saith the LORD, though it cannot be searched; because they are more than the grasshoppers, and innumerable.

chapters.zh: 埃及的民（原文是女子）必然蒙羞，必交在北方人的手中。
chapters.en: The daughter of Egypt shall be confounded; she shall be delivered into the hand of the people of the north.

chapters.zh: 万军之耶和华 ─ 以色列的神说：我必刑罚挪的亚扪（埃及尊大之神）和法老，并埃及与埃及的神，以及君王，也必刑罚法老和倚靠他的人。
chapters.en: The LORD of hosts, the God of Israel, saith; Behold, I will punish the multitude of No, and Pharaoh, and Egypt, with their gods, and their kings; even Pharaoh, and them that trust in him:

chapters.zh: 我要将他们交付寻索其命之人的手和巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒与他臣仆的手；以后埃及必再有人居住，与从前一样。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: And I will deliver them into the hand of those that seek their lives, and into the hand of Nebuchadrezzar king of Babylon, and into the hand of his servants: and afterward it shall be inhabited, as in the days of old, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 我的仆人雅各啊，不要惧怕！以色列啊，不要惊惶！因我要从远方拯救你，从被掳到之地拯救你的后裔。雅各必回来，得享平靖安逸，无人使他害怕。
chapters.en: But fear not thou, O my servant Jacob, and be not dismayed, O Israel: for, behold, I will save thee from afar off, and thy seed from the land of their captivity; and Jacob shall return, and be in rest and at ease, and none shall make afraid.

chapters.zh: 我的仆人雅各啊，不要惧怕！因我与你同在。我要将我所赶你到的那些国灭绝净尽，却不将你灭绝净尽，倒要从宽惩治你，万不能不罚你（不罚你：或译以你为无罪）。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: Fear thou not, O Jacob my servant, saith the LORD: for I with thee; for I will make a full end of all the nations whither I have driven thee: but I will not make a full end of thee, but correct thee in measure; yet will I not leave thee wholly unpunished.

chapters.zh: 法老攻击迦萨之先，有耶和华论非利士人的话临到先知耶利米。
chapters.en: The word of the LORD that came to Jeremiah the prophet against the Philistines, before that Pharaoh smote Gaza.

chapters.zh: 耶和华如此说：有水从北方发起，成为涨溢的河，要涨过遍地和其中所有的，并城和其中所住的。人必呼喊；境内的居民都必哀号。
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD; Behold, waters rise up out of the north, and shall be an overflowing flood, and shall overflow the land, and all that is therein; the city, and them that dwell therein: then the men shall cry, and all the inhabitants of the land shall howl.

chapters.zh: 听见敌人壮马蹄跳的响声和战车隆隆、车轮轰轰；为父的手就发软，不回头看顾儿女。
chapters.en: At the noise of the stamping of the hoofs of his strong , at the rushing of his chariots, the rumbling of his wheels, the fathers shall not look back to children for feebleness of hands;

chapters.zh: 因为日子将到，要毁灭一切非利士人，剪除帮助推罗、西顿所剩下的人。原来耶和华必毁灭非利士人，就是迦斐托海岛余剩的人。
chapters.en: Because of the day that cometh to spoil all the Philistines, to cut off from Tyrus and Zidon every helper that remaineth: for the LORD will spoil the Philistines, the remnant of the country of Caphtor.

chapters.zh: 迦萨成了光秃；平原中所剩的亚实基伦归于无有。你用刀划身，要到几时呢？
chapters.en: Baldness is come upon Gaza; Ashkelon is cut off the remnant of their valley: how long wilt thou cut thyself?

chapters.zh: 耶和华的刀剑哪，你到几时才止息呢？你要入鞘，安靖不动。
chapters.en: O thou sword of the LORD, how long ere thou be quiet? put up thyself into thy scabbard, rest, and be still.

chapters.zh: 耶和华既吩咐你攻击亚实基伦和海边之地，他已经派定你，焉能止息呢？
chapters.en: How can it be quiet, seeing the LORD hath given it a charge against Ashkelon, and against the sea shore? there hath he appointed it.

chapters.zh: 论摩押。万军之耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：尼波有祸了！因变为荒场。基列亭蒙羞被攻取。米斯迦蒙羞被毁坏；
chapters.en: Against Moab thus saith the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel; Woe unto Nebo! for it is spoiled: Kiriathaim is confounded taken: Misgab is confounded and dismayed.

chapters.zh: 摩押不再被称赞。有人在希实本设计谋害他，说：来罢！我们将他剪除，不再成国。玛得缅哪，你也必默默无声；刀剑必追赶你。
chapters.en: no more praise of Moab: in Heshbon they have devised evil against it; come, and let us cut it off from a nation. Also thou shalt be cut down, O Madmen; the sword shall pursue thee.

chapters.zh: 从何罗念有喊荒凉大毁灭的哀声：
chapters.en: A voice of crying from Horonaim, spoiling and great destruction.

chapters.zh: 摩押毁灭了！他的孩童（或译：家僮）发哀声，使人听见。
chapters.en: Moab is destroyed; her little ones have caused a cry to be heard.

chapters.zh: 人上鲁希坡随走随哭，因为在何罗念的下坡听见毁灭的哀声。
chapters.en: For in the going up of Luhith continual weeping shall go up; for in the going down of Horonaim the enemies have heard a cry of destruction.

chapters.zh: 你们要奔逃，自救性命，独自居住，好像旷野的杜松。
chapters.en: Flee, save your lives, and be like the heath in the wilderness.

chapters.zh: 你因倚靠自己所做的和自己的财宝必被攻取。基抹和属他的祭司、首领也要一同被掳去。
chapters.en: For because thou hast trusted in thy works and in thy treasures, thou shalt also be taken: and Chemosh shall go forth into captivity his priests and his princes together.

chapters.zh: 行毁灭的必来到各城，并无一城得免。山谷必致败落，平原必被毁坏；正如耶和华所说的。
chapters.en: And the spoiler shall come upon every city, and no city shall escape: the valley also shall perish, and the plain shall be destroyed, as the LORD hath spoken.

chapters.zh: 要将翅膀给摩押，使他可以飞去。他的城邑必致荒凉，无人居住。
chapters.en: Give wings unto Moab, that it may flee and get away: for the cities thereof shall be desolate, without any to dwell therein.

chapters.zh: （懒惰为耶和华行事的，必受咒诅；禁止刀剑不经血的，必受咒诅。）
chapters.en: Cursed he that doeth the work of the LORD deceitfully, and cursed he that keepeth back his sword from blood.

chapters.zh: 摩押自幼年以来常享安逸，如酒在渣滓上澄清，没有从这器皿倒在那器皿里，也未曾被掳去。因此，他的原味尚存，香气未变。
chapters.en: Moab hath been at ease from his youth, and he hath settled on his lees, and hath not been emptied from vessel to vessel, neither hath he gone into captivity: therefore his taste remained in him, and his scent is not changed.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：日子将到，我必打发倒酒的往他那里去，将他倒出来，倒空他的器皿，打碎他的坛子。
chapters.en: Therefore, behold, the days come, saith the LORD, that I will send unto him wanderers, that shall cause him to wander, and shall empty his vessels, and break their bottles.

chapters.zh: 摩押必因基抹羞愧，像以色列家从前倚靠伯特利的神羞愧一样。
chapters.en: And Moab shall be ashamed of Chemosh, as the house of Israel was ashamed of Bethel their confidence.

chapters.zh: 你们怎么说：我们是勇士，是有勇力打仗的呢？
chapters.en: How say ye, We mighty and strong men for the war?

chapters.zh: 摩押变为荒场，敌人上去进了他的城邑。他所特选的少年人下去遭了杀戮；这是君王 ─ 名为万军之耶和华说的。
chapters.en: Moab is spoiled, and gone up her cities, and his chosen young men are gone down to the slaughter, saith the King, whose name the LORD of hosts.

chapters.zh: 摩押的灾殃临近；他的苦难速速来到。
chapters.en: The calamity of Moab near to come, and his affliction hasteth fast.

chapters.zh: 凡在他四围的和认识他名的，你们都要为他悲伤，说：那结实的杖和那美好的棍，何竟折断了呢？
chapters.en: All ye that are about him, bemoan him; and all ye that know his name, say, How is the strong staff broken, the beautiful rod!

chapters.zh: 住在底本的民哪（原文是女子），要从你荣耀的位上下来，坐受干渴；因毁灭摩押的上来攻击你，毁坏了你的保障。
chapters.en: Thou daughter that dost inhabit Dibon, come down from glory, and sit in thirst; for the spoiler of Moab shall come upon thee, he shall destroy thy strong holds.

chapters.zh: 住亚罗珥的啊，要站在道旁观望，问逃避的男人和逃脱的女人说：是甚么事呢？
chapters.en: O inhabitant of Aroer, stand by the way, and espy; ask him that fleeth, and her that escapeth, say, What is done?

chapters.zh: 摩押因毁坏蒙羞；你们要哀号呼喊，要在亚嫩旁报告说：摩押变为荒场！
chapters.en: Moab is confounded; for it is broken down: howl and cry; tell ye it in Arnon, that Moab is spoiled,

chapters.zh: 刑罚临到平原之地的何伦、雅杂、米法押、
chapters.en: And judgment is come upon the plain country; upon Holon, and upon Jahazah, and upon Mephaath,

chapters.zh: 底本、尼波、伯 • 低比拉太音、
chapters.en: And upon Dibon, and upon Nebo, and upon Bethdiblathaim,

chapters.zh: 基列亭、伯迦末、伯 • 米恩、
chapters.en: And upon Kiriathaim, and upon Bethgamul, and upon Bethmeon,

chapters.zh: 加略、波斯拉，和摩押地远近所有的城邑。
chapters.en: And upon Kerioth, and upon Bozrah, and upon all the cities of the land of Moab, far or near.

chapters.zh: 摩押的角砍断了，摩押的膀臂折断了。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: The horn of Moab is cut off, and his arm is broken, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 你们要使摩押沉醉，因他向耶和华夸大。他要在自己所吐之中打滚，又要被人嗤笑。
chapters.en: Make ye him drunken: for he magnified against the LORD: Moab also shall wallow in his vomit, and he also shall be in derision.

chapters.zh: 摩押啊，你不曾嗤笑以色列么？他岂是在贼中查出来的呢？你每逢提到他便摇头。
chapters.en: For was not Israel a derision unto thee? was he found among thieves? for since thou spakest of him, thou skippedst for joy.

chapters.zh: 摩押的居民哪，要离开城邑，住在山崖里，像鸽子在深渊口上搭窝。
chapters.en: O ye that dwell in Moab, leave the cities, and dwell in the rock, and be like the dove maketh her nest in the sides of the hole's mouth.

chapters.zh: 我们听说摩押人骄傲，是极其骄傲；听说他自高自傲，并且狂妄，居心自大。
chapters.en: We have heard the pride of Moab, (he is exceeding proud) his loftiness, and his arrogancy, and his pride, and the haughtiness of his heart.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：我知道他的忿怒是虚空的；他夸大的话一无所成。
chapters.en: I know his wrath, saith the LORD; but not so; his lies shall not so effect .

chapters.zh: 因此，我要为摩押哀号，为摩押全地呼喊；人必为吉珥 • 哈列设人叹息。
chapters.en: Therefore will I howl for Moab, and I will cry out for all Moab; shall mourn for the men of Kirheres.

chapters.zh: 西比玛的葡萄树啊，我为你哀哭，甚于雅谢人哀哭。你的枝子蔓延过海，直长到雅谢海。那行毁灭的已经临到你夏天的果子和你所摘的葡萄。
chapters.en: O vine of Sibmah, I will weep for thee with the weeping of Jazer: thy plants are gone over the sea, they reach to the sea of Jazer: the spoiler is fallen upon thy summer fruits and upon thy vintage.

chapters.zh: 肥田和摩押地的欢喜快乐都被夺去；我使酒醡的酒绝流，无人踹酒欢呼；那欢呼却变为仇敌的呐喊（原文是那欢呼却不是欢呼）。
chapters.en: And joy and gladness is taken from the plentiful field, and from the land of Moab; and I have caused wine to fail from the winepresses: none shall tread with shouting; shouting no shouting.

chapters.zh: 希实本人发的哀声达到以利亚利，直达到雅杂；从琐珥达到何罗念，直到伊基拉施利施亚，因为宁林的水必然干涸。
chapters.en: From the cry of Heshbon unto Elealeh, unto Jahaz, have they uttered their voice, from Zoar unto Horonaim, an heifer of three years old: for the waters also of Nimrim shall be desolate.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：我必在摩押地使那在邱坛献祭的，和那向他的神烧香的都断绝了。
chapters.en: Moreover I will cause to cease in Moab, saith the LORD, him that offereth in the high places, and him that burneth incense to his gods.

chapters.zh: 我心腹为摩押哀鸣如箫，我心肠为吉珥 • 哈列设人也是如此，因摩押人所得的财物都灭没了。
chapters.en: Therefore mine heart shall sound for Moab like pipes, and mine heart shall sound like pipes for the men of Kirheres: because the riches he hath gotten are perished.

chapters.zh: 各人头上光秃，胡须剪短，手有划伤，腰束麻布。
chapters.en: For every head bald, and every beard clipped: upon all the hands cuttings, and upon the loins sackcloth.

chapters.zh: 在摩押的各房顶上和街市上处处有人哀哭；因我打碎摩押，好像打碎无人喜悦的器皿。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: lamentation generally upon all the housetops of Moab, and in the streets thereof: for I have broken Moab like a vessel wherein no pleasure, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 摩押何等毁坏！何等哀号！何等羞愧转背！这样，摩押必令四围的人嗤笑惊骇。
chapters.en: They shall howl, , How is it broken down! how hath Moab turned the back with shame! so shall Moab be a derision and a dismaying to all them about him.

chapters.zh: 耶和华如此说：仇敌必如大鹰飞起，展开翅膀，攻击摩押。
chapters.en: For thus saith the LORD; Behold, he shall fly as an eagle, and shall spread his wings over Moab.

chapters.zh: 加略被攻取，保障也被占据。到那日，摩押的勇士心中疼痛如临产的妇人。
chapters.en: Kerioth is taken, and the strong holds are surprised, and the mighty men's hearts in Moab at that day shall be as the heart of a woman in her pangs.

chapters.zh: 摩押必被毁灭，不再成国，因他向耶和华夸大。
chapters.en: And Moab shall be destroyed from a people, because he hath magnified against the LORD.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：摩押的居民哪，恐惧、陷坑、网罗都临近你。
chapters.en: Fear, and the pit, and the snare, upon thee, O inhabitant of Moab, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 躲避恐惧的必坠入陷坑；从陷坑上来的必被网罗缠住；因我必使追讨之年临到摩押。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: He that fleeth from the fear shall fall into the pit; and he that getteth up out of the pit shall be taken in the snare: for I will bring upon it, upon Moab, the year of their visitation, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 躲避的人无力站在希实本的影下；因为有火从希实本发出，有火燄出于西宏的城，烧尽摩押的角和哄嚷人的头顶。
chapters.en: They that fled stood under the shadow of Heshbon because of the force: but a fire shall come forth out of Heshbon, and a flame from the midst of Sihon, and shall devour the corner of Moab, and the crown of the head of the tumultuous ones.

chapters.zh: 摩押啊，你有祸了！属基抹的民灭亡了！因你的众子都被掳去，你的众女也被掳去。
chapters.en: Woe be unto thee, O Moab! the people of Chemosh perisheth: for thy sons are taken captives, and thy daughters captives.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：到末后，我还要使被掳的摩押人归回。摩押受审判的话到此为止。
chapters.en: Yet will I bring again the captivity of Moab in the latter days, saith the LORD. Thus far the judgment of Moab.

chapters.zh: 论亚扪人。耶和华如此说：以色列没有儿子么？没有后嗣么？玛勒堪为何得迦得之地为业呢？属他的民为何住其中的城邑呢？
chapters.en: Concerning the Ammonites, thus saith the LORD; Hath Israel no sons? hath he no heir? why doth their king inherit Gad, and his people dwell in his cities?

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：日子将到，我必使人听见打仗的喊声，是攻击亚扪人拉巴的喊声。拉巴要成为乱堆；属他的乡村（原文是女子）要被火焚烧。先前得以色列地为业的，此时以色列倒要得他们的地为业。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: Therefore, behold, the days come, saith the LORD, that I will cause an alarm of war to be heard in Rabbah of the Ammonites; and it shall be a desolate heap, and her daughters shall be burned with fire: then shall Israel be heir unto them that were his heirs, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 希实本哪，你要哀号，因为爱地变为荒场。拉巴的居民（原文是女子）哪，要呼喊，以麻布束腰；要哭号，在篱笆中跑来跑去；因玛勒堪和属他的祭司、首领要一同被掳去。
chapters.en: Howl, O Heshbon, for Ai is spoiled: cry, ye daughters of Rabbah, gird you with sackcloth; lament, and run to and fro by the hedges; for their king shall go into captivity, his priests and his princes together.

chapters.zh: 背道的民（原文是女子）哪，你们为何因有山谷，就是水流的山谷夸张呢？为何倚靠财宝说：谁能来到我们这里呢？
chapters.en: Wherefore gloriest thou in the valleys, thy flowing valley, O backsliding daughter? that trusted in her treasures, , Who shall come unto me?

chapters.zh: 主 ─ 万军之耶和华说：我要使恐吓从四围的人中临到你们；你们必被赶出，各人一直前往，没有人收聚逃民。
chapters.en: Behold, I will bring a fear upon thee, saith the Lord GOD of hosts, from all those that be about thee; and ye shall be driven out every man right forth; and none shall gather up him that wandereth.

chapters.zh: 后来我还要使被掳的亚扪人归回。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: And afterward I will bring again the captivity of the children of Ammon, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 论以东。万军之耶和华如此说：提幔中再没有智慧么？明哲人不再有谋略么？他们的智慧尽归无有么？
chapters.en: Concerning Edom, thus saith the LORD of hosts; wisdom no more in Teman? is counsel perished from the prudent? is their wisdom vanished?

chapters.zh: 底但的居民哪，要转身逃跑，住在深密处；因为我向以扫追讨的时候，必使灾殃临到他。
chapters.en: Flee ye, turn back, dwell deep, O inhabitants of Dedan; for I will bring the calamity of Esau upon him, the time I will visit him.

chapters.zh: 摘葡萄的若来到他那里，岂不剩下些葡萄呢？盗贼若夜间而来，岂不毁坏直到够了呢？
chapters.en: If grapegatherers come to thee, would they not leave gleaning grapes? if thieves by night, they will destroy till they have enough.

chapters.zh: 我却使以扫赤露，显出他的隐密处；他不能自藏。他的后裔、弟兄、邻舍尽都灭绝；他也归于无有。
chapters.en: But I have made Esau bare, I have uncovered his secret places, and he shall not be able to hide himself: his seed is spoiled, and his brethren, and his neighbours, and he not.

chapters.zh: 你撇下孤儿，我必保全他们的命；你的寡妇可以倚靠我。
chapters.en: Leave thy fatherless children, I will preserve alive; and let thy widows trust in me.

chapters.zh: 耶和华如此说：原不该喝那杯的一定要喝。你能尽免刑罚么？你必不能免，一定要喝！
chapters.en: For thus saith the LORD; Behold, they whose judgment not to drink of the cup have assuredly drunken; and thou he shall altogether go unpunished? thou shalt not go unpunished, but thou shalt surely drink .

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：我指著自己起誓，波斯拉必令人惊骇、羞辱、咒诅，并且荒凉。他的一切城邑必变为永远的荒场。
chapters.en: For I have sworn by myself, saith the LORD, that Bozrah shall become a desolation, a reproach, a waste, and a curse; and all the cities thereof shall be perpetual wastes.

chapters.zh: 我从耶和华那里听见信息，并有使者被差往列国去，说：你们聚集来攻击以东，要起来争战。
chapters.en: I have heard a rumour from the LORD, and an ambassador is sent unto the heathen, , Gather ye together, and come against her, and rise up to the battle.

chapters.zh: 我使你在列国中为最小，在世人中被藐视。
chapters.en: For, lo, I will make thee small among the heathen, despised among men.

chapters.zh: 住在山穴中据守山顶的啊，论到你的威吓，你因心中的狂傲自欺；你虽如大鹰高高搭窝，我却从那里拉下你来。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: Thy terribleness hath deceived thee, the pride of thine heart, O thou that dwellest in the clefts of the rock, that holdest the height of the hill: though thou shouldest make thy nest as high as the eagle, I will bring thee down from thence, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 以东必令人惊骇；凡经过的人就受惊骇，又因他一切的灾祸嗤笑。
chapters.en: Also Edom shall be a desolation: every one that goeth by it shall be astonished, and shall hiss at all the plagues thereof.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：必无人住在那里，也无人在其中寄居，要像所多玛、蛾摩拉，和邻近的城邑倾覆的时候一样。
chapters.en: As in the overthrow of Sodom and Gomorrah and the neighbour thereof, saith the LORD, no man shall abide there, neither shall a son of man dwell in it.

chapters.zh: 仇敌必像狮子从约但河边的丛林上来，攻击坚固的居所。转眼之间，我要使以东人逃跑，离开这地。谁蒙拣选，我就派谁治理这地。谁能比我呢？谁能给我定规日期呢？有何牧人能在我面前站立得住呢？
chapters.en: Behold, he shall come up like a lion from the swelling of Jordan against the habitation of the strong: but I will suddenly make him run away from her: and who a chosen I may appoint over her? for who like me? and who will appoint me the time? and who that shepherd that will stand before me?

chapters.zh: 你们要听耶和华攻击以东所说的谋略和他攻击提幔居民所定的旨意。仇敌定要将他们群众微弱的拉去，定要使他们的居所荒凉。
chapters.en: Therefore hear the counsel of the LORD, that he hath taken against Edom; and his purposes, that he hath purposed against the inhabitants of Teman: Surely the least of the flock shall draw them out: surely he shall make their habitations desolate with them.

chapters.zh: 因他们仆倒的声音，地就震动。人在红海那里必听见呼喊的声音。
chapters.en: The earth is moved at the noise of their fall, at the cry the noise thereof was heard in the Red sea.

chapters.zh: 仇敌必如大鹰飞起，展开翅膀攻击波斯拉。到那日，以东的勇士心中疼痛如临产的妇人。
chapters.en: Behold, he shall come up and fly as the eagle, and spread his wings over Bozrah: and at that day shall the heart of the mighty men of Edom be as the heart of a woman in her pangs.

chapters.zh: 论大马色。哈马和亚珥拔蒙羞，因他们听见凶恶的信息就消化了。海上有忧愁，不得平静。
chapters.en: Concerning Damascus. Hamath is confounded, and Arpad: for they have heard evil tidings: they are fainthearted; sorrow on the sea; it cannot be quiet.

chapters.zh: 大马色发软，转身逃跑。战兢将他捉住；痛苦忧愁将他抓住，如产难的妇人一样。
chapters.en: Damascus is waxed feeble, turneth herself to flee, and fear hath seized on : anguish and sorrows have taken her, as a woman in travail.

chapters.zh: 我所喜乐可称赞的城，为何被撇弃了呢？
chapters.en: How is the city of praise not left, the city of my joy!

chapters.zh: 他的少年人必仆倒在街上；当那日，一切兵丁必默默无声。这是万军之耶和华说的。
chapters.en: Therefore her young men shall fall in her streets, and all the men of war shall be cut off in that day, saith the LORD of hosts.

chapters.zh: 我必在大马色城中使火著起，烧灭便哈达的宫殿。
chapters.en: And I will kindle a fire in the wall of Damascus, and it shall consume the palaces of Benhadad.

chapters.zh: 论巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒所攻打的基达和夏琐的诸国。耶和华如此说：迦勒底人哪，起来上基达去，毁灭东方人。
chapters.en: Concerning Kedar, and concerning the kingdoms of Hazor, which Nebuchadrezzar king of Babylon shall smite, thus saith the LORD; Arise ye, go up to Kedar, and spoil the men of the east.

chapters.zh: 他们的帐棚和羊群都要夺去，将幔子和一切器皿，并骆驼为自己掠去。人向他们喊著说：四围都有惊吓。
chapters.en: Their tents and their flocks shall they take away: they shall take to themselves their curtains, and all their vessels, and their camels; and they shall cry unto them, Fear on every side.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：夏琐的居民哪，要逃奔远方，住在深密处；因为巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒设计谋害你们，起意攻击你们。
chapters.en: Flee, get you far off, dwell deep, O ye inhabitants of Hazor, saith the LORD; for Nebuchadrezzar king of Babylon hath taken counsel against you, and hath conceived a purpose against you.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：迦勒底人哪，起来！上安逸无虑的居民那里去；他们是无门无闩、独自居住的。
chapters.en: Arise, get you up unto the wealthy nation, that dwelleth without care, saith the LORD, which have neither gates nor bars, dwell alone.

chapters.zh: 他们的骆驼必成为掠物；他们众多的牲畜必成为掳物。我必将剃周围头发的人分散四方（原文是风），使灾殃从四围临到他们。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: And their camels shall be a booty, and the multitude of their cattle a spoil: and I will scatter into all winds them in the utmost corners; and I will bring their calamity from all sides thereof, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 夏琐必成为野狗的住处，永远凄凉；必无人住在那里，也无人在其中寄居。
chapters.en: And Hazor shall be a dwelling for dragons, a desolation for ever: there shall no man abide there, nor son of man dwell in it.

chapters.zh: 犹大王西底家登基的时候，耶和华论以拦的话临到先知耶利米说：
chapters.en: The word of the LORD that came to Jeremiah the prophet against Elam in the beginning of the reign of Zedekiah king of Judah, saying,

chapters.zh: 万军之耶和华如此说：我必折断以拦人的弓，就是他们为首的权力。
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD of hosts; Behold, I will break the bow of Elam, the chief of their might.

chapters.zh: 我要使四风从天的四方刮来，临到以拦人，将他们分散四方（原文是风）。这被赶散的人没有一国不到的。
chapters.en: And upon Elam will I bring the four winds from the four quarters of heaven, and will scatter them toward all those winds; and there shall be no nation whither the outcasts of Elam shall not come.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：我必使以拦人在仇敌和寻索其命的人面前惊惶；我也必使灾祸，就是我的烈怒临到他们，又必使刀剑追杀他们，直到将他们灭尽。
chapters.en: For I will cause Elam to be dismayed before their enemies, and before them that seek their life: and I will bring evil upon them, my fierce anger, saith the LORD; and I will send the sword after them, till I have consumed them:

chapters.zh: 我要在以拦设立我的宝座，从那里除灭君王和首领。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: And I will set my throne in Elam, and will destroy from thence the king and the princes, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 到末后，我还要使被掳的以拦人归回。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: But it shall come to pass in the latter days, I will bring again the captivity of Elam, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 耶和华藉先知耶利米论巴比伦和迦勒底人之地所说的话。
chapters.en: The word that the LORD spake against Babylon against the land of the Chaldeans by Jeremiah the prophet.

chapters.zh: 你们要在万国中传扬报告，竖立大旗；要报告，不可隐瞒，说：巴比伦被攻取，彼勒蒙羞，米罗达惊惶。巴比伦的神像都蒙羞；他的偶像都惊惶。
chapters.en: Declare ye among the nations, and publish, and set up a standard; publish, conceal not: say, Babylon is taken, Bel is confounded, Merodach is broken in pieces; her idols are confounded, her images are broken in pieces.

chapters.zh: 因有一国从北方上来攻击他，使他的地荒凉，无人居住，连人带牲畜都逃走了。
chapters.en: For out of the north there cometh up a nation against her, which shall make her land desolate, and none shall dwell therein: they shall remove, they shall depart, both man and beast.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：当那日子、那时候，以色列人要和犹大人同来，随走随哭，寻求耶和华 ─ 他们的神。
chapters.en: In those days, and in that time, saith the LORD, the children of Israel shall come, they and the children of Judah together, going and weeping: they shall go, and seek the LORD their God.

chapters.zh: 他们必访问锡安，又面向这里，说：来罢，你们要与耶和华联合为永远不忘的约。
chapters.en: They shall ask the way to Zion with their faces thitherward, , Come, and let us join ourselves to the LORD in a perpetual covenant shall not be forgotten.

chapters.zh: 我的百姓作了迷失的羊，牧人使他们走差路，使他们转到山上。他们从大山走到小山，竟忘了安歇之处。
chapters.en: My people hath been lost sheep: their shepherds have caused them to go astray, they have turned them away the mountains: they have gone from mountain to hill, they have forgotten their restingplace.

chapters.zh: 凡遇见他们的，就把他们吞灭。敌人说：我们没有罪；因他们得罪那作公义居所的耶和华，就是他们列祖所仰望的耶和华。
chapters.en: All that found them have devoured them: and their adversaries said, We offend not, because they have sinned against the LORD, the habitation of justice, even the LORD, the hope of their fathers.

chapters.zh: 我民哪，你们要从巴比伦中逃走，从迦勒底人之地出去，要像羊群前面走的公山羊。
chapters.en: Remove out of the midst of Babylon, and go forth out of the land of the Chaldeans, and be as the he goats before the flocks.

chapters.zh: 因我必激动联合的大国从北方上来攻击巴比伦，他们要摆阵攻击他；他必从那里被攻取。他们的箭好像善射之勇士的箭，一枝也不徒然返回。
chapters.en: For, lo, I will raise and cause to come up against Babylon an assembly of great nations from the north country: and they shall set themselves in array against her; from thence she shall be taken: their arrows as of a mighty expert man; none shall return in vain.

chapters.zh: 迦勒底必成为掠物；凡掳掠他的都必心满意足。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: And Chaldea shall be a spoil: all that spoil her shall be satisfied, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 抢夺我产业的啊，你们因欢喜快乐，且像踹谷撒欢的母牛犊，又像发嘶声的壮马。
chapters.en: Because ye were glad, because ye rejoiced, O ye destroyers of mine heritage, because ye are grown fat as the heifer at grass, and bellow as bulls;

chapters.zh: 你们的母巴比伦就极其抱愧，生你们的必然蒙羞。他要列在诸国之末，成为旷野、旱地、沙漠。
chapters.en: Your mother shall be sore confounded; she that bare you shall be ashamed: behold, the hindermost of the nations a wilderness, a dry land, and a desert.

chapters.zh: 因耶和华的忿怒，必无人居住，要全然荒凉。凡经过巴比伦的要受惊骇，又因他所遭的灾殃嗤笑。
chapters.en: Because of the wrath of the LORD it shall not be inhabited, but it shall be wholly desolate: every one that goeth by Babylon shall be astonished, and hiss at all her plagues.

chapters.zh: 所有拉弓的，你们要在巴比伦的四围摆阵，射箭攻击他。不要爱惜箭枝，因他得罪了耶和华。
chapters.en: Put yourselves in array against Babylon round about: all ye that bend the bow, shoot at her, spare no arrows: for she hath sinned against the LORD.

chapters.zh: 你们要在他四围呐喊；他已经投降。外郭坍塌了，城墙拆毁了，因为这是耶和华报仇的事。你们要向巴比伦报仇；他怎样待人，也要怎样待他。
chapters.en: Shout against her round about: she hath given her hand: her foundations are fallen, her walls are thrown down: for it the vengeance of the LORD: take vengeance upon her; as she hath done, do unto her.

chapters.zh: 你们要将巴比伦撒种的和收割时拿镰刀的都剪除了。他们各人因怕欺压的刀剑，必归回本族，逃到本土。
chapters.en: Cut off the sower from Babylon, and him that handleth the sickle in the time of harvest: for fear of the oppressing sword they shall turn every one to his people, and they shall flee every one to his own land.

chapters.zh: 以色列是打散的羊，是被狮子赶出的。首先是亚述王将他吞灭，末后是巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒将他的骨头折断。
chapters.en: Israel a scattered sheep; the lions have driven away: first the king of Assyria hath devoured him; and last this Nebuchadrezzar king of Babylon hath broken his bones.

chapters.zh: 所以万军之耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：我必罚巴比伦王和他的地，像我从前罚亚述王一样。
chapters.en: Therefore thus saith the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel; Behold, I will punish the king of Babylon and his land, as I have punished the king of Assyria.

chapters.zh: 我必再领以色列回他的草场，他必在迦密和巴珊吃草，又在以法莲山上和基列境内得以饱足。
chapters.en: And I will bring Israel again to his habitation, and he shall feed on Carmel and Bashan, and his soul shall be satisfied upon mount Ephraim and Gilead.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：当那日子、那时候，虽寻以色列的罪孽，一无所有；虽寻犹大的罪恶，也无所见；因为我所留下的人，我必赦免。
chapters.en: In those days, and in that time, saith the LORD, the iniquity of Israel shall be sought for, and none; and the sins of Judah, and they shall not be found: for I will pardon them whom I reserve.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：上去攻击米拉大翁之地，又攻击比割的居民。要追杀灭尽，照我一切所吩咐你的去行。
chapters.en: Go up against the land of Merathaim, against it, and against the inhabitants of Pekod: waste and utterly destroy after them, saith the LORD, and do according to all that I have commanded thee.

chapters.zh: 境内有打仗和大毁灭的响声。
chapters.en: A sound of battle in the land, and of great destruction.

chapters.zh: 全地的大锤何竟砍断破坏？巴比伦在列国中何竟荒凉？
chapters.en: How is the hammer of the whole earth cut asunder and broken! how is Babylon become a desolation among the nations!

chapters.zh: 巴比伦哪，我为你设下网罗，你不知不觉被缠住。你被寻著，也被捉住；因为你与耶和华争竞。
chapters.en: I have laid a snare for thee, and thou art also taken, O Babylon, and thou wast not aware: thou art found, and also caught, because thou hast striven against the LORD.

chapters.zh: 耶和华已经开了武库，拿出他恼恨的兵器；因为主 ─ 万军之耶和华在迦勒底人之地有当做的事。
chapters.en: The LORD hath opened his armoury, and hath brought forth the weapons of his indignation: for this the work of the Lord GOD of hosts in the land of the Chaldeans.

chapters.zh: 你们要从极远的边界来攻击他，开他的仓廪，将他堆如高堆，毁灭净尽，丝毫不留。
chapters.en: Come against her from the utmost border, open her storehouses: cast her up as heaps, and destroy her utterly: let nothing of her be left.

chapters.zh: 要杀他的一切牛犊，使他们下去遭遇杀戮。他们有祸了，因为追讨他们的日子已经来到。
chapters.en: Slay all her bullocks; let them go down to the slaughter: woe unto them! for their day is come, the time of their visitation.

chapters.zh: （有从巴比伦之地逃避出来的人，在锡安扬声报告耶和华 ─ 我们的神报仇，就是为他的殿报仇。）
chapters.en: The voice of them that flee and escape out of the land of Babylon, to declare in Zion the vengeance of the LORD our God, the vengeance of his temple.

chapters.zh: 招集一切弓箭手来攻击巴比伦。要在巴比伦四围安营，不要容一人逃脱，照著他所做的报应他；他怎样待人，也要怎样待他，因为他向耶和华 ─ 以色列的圣者发了狂傲。
chapters.en: Call together the archers against Babylon: all ye that bend the bow, camp against it round about; let none thereof escape: recompense her according to her work; according to all that she hath done, do unto her: for she hath been proud against the LORD, against the Holy One of Israel.

chapters.zh: 所以他的少年人必仆倒在街上。当那日，一切兵丁必默默无声。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: Therefore shall her young men fall in the streets, and all her men of war shall be cut off in that day, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 主 ─ 万军之耶和华说：你这狂傲的啊，我与你反对，因为我追讨你的日子已经来到。
chapters.en: Behold, I against thee, most proud, saith the Lord GOD of hosts: for thy day is come, the time I will visit thee.

chapters.zh: 狂傲的必绊跌仆倒，无人扶起。我也必使火在他的城邑中里起来，将他四围所有的尽行烧灭。
chapters.en: And the most proud shall stumble and fall, and none shall raise him up: and I will kindle a fire in his cities, and it shall devour all round about him.

chapters.zh: 万军之耶和华如此说：以色列人和犹大人一同受欺压；凡掳掠他们的都紧紧抓住他们，不肯释放。
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD of hosts; The children of Israel and the children of Judah oppressed together: and all that took them captives held them fast; they refused to let them go.

chapters.zh: 他们的救赎主大有能力，万军之耶和华是他的名。他必伸清他们的冤，好使全地得平安，并搅扰巴比伦的居民。
chapters.en: Their Redeemer strong; the LORD of hosts his name: he shall throughly plead their cause, that he may give rest to the land, and disquiet the inhabitants of Babylon.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：有刀剑临到迦勒底人和巴比伦的居民，并他的首领与智慧人。
chapters.en: A sword upon the Chaldeans, saith the LORD, and upon the inhabitants of Babylon, and upon her princes, and upon her wise .

chapters.zh: 有刀剑临到矜夸的人，他们就成为愚昧；有刀剑临到他的勇士，他们就惊惶。
chapters.en: A sword upon the liars; and they shall dote: a sword upon her mighty men; and they shall be dismayed.

chapters.zh: 有刀剑临到他的马匹、车辆，和其中杂族的人民；他们必像妇女一样。有刀剑临到他的宝物，就被抢夺。
chapters.en: A sword upon their horses, and upon their chariots, and upon all the mingled people that in the midst of her; and they shall become as women: a sword upon her treasures; and they shall be robbed.

chapters.zh: 有干旱临到他的众水，就必干涸；因为这是有雕刻偶像之地，人因偶像而颠狂。
chapters.en: A drought upon her waters; and they shall be dried up: for it the land of graven images, and they are mad upon idols.

chapters.zh: 所以旷野的走兽和豺狼必住在那里，鸵鸟也住在其中，永无人烟，世世代代无人居住。
chapters.en: Therefore the wild beasts of the desert with the wild beasts of the islands shall dwell , and the owls shall dwell therein: and it shall be no more inhabited for ever; neither shall it be dwelt in from generation to generation.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：必无人住在那里，也无人在其中寄居，要像我倾覆所多玛、蛾摩拉，和邻近的城邑一样。
chapters.en: As God overthrew Sodom and Gomorrah and the neighbour thereof, saith the LORD; shall no man abide there, neither shall any son of man dwell therein.

chapters.zh: 看哪，有一种民从北方而来，并有一大国和许多君王被激动，从地极来到。
chapters.en: Behold, a people shall come from the north, and a great nation, and many kings shall be raised up from the coasts of the earth.

chapters.zh: 他们拿弓和枪，性情残忍，不施怜悯；他们的声音像海浪匉訇。巴比伦城（原文是女子）啊，他们骑马，都摆队伍如上战场的人，要攻击你。
chapters.en: They shall hold the bow and the lance: they cruel, and will not shew mercy: their voice shall roar like the sea, and they shall ride upon horses, put in array, like a man to the battle, against thee, O daughter of Babylon.

chapters.zh: 巴比伦王听见他们的风声，手就发软，痛苦将他抓住，疼痛彷佛产难的妇人。
chapters.en: The king of Babylon hath heard the report of them, and his hands waxed feeble: anguish took hold of him, pangs as of a woman in travail.

chapters.zh: 仇敌必像狮子从约但河边的丛林上来，攻击坚固的居所。转眼之间，我要使他们逃跑，离开这地。谁蒙拣选，我就派谁治理这地。谁能比我呢？谁能给我定规日期呢？有何牧人能在我面前站立得住呢？
chapters.en: Behold, he shall come up like a lion from the swelling of Jordan unto the habitation of the strong: but I will make them suddenly run away from her: and who a chosen I may appoint over her? for who like me? and who will appoint me the time? and who that shepherd that will stand before me?

chapters.zh: 你们要听耶和华攻击巴比伦所说的谋略和他攻击迦勒底人之地所定的旨意。仇敌定要将他们群众微弱的拉去，定要使他们的居所荒凉。
chapters.en: Therefore hear ye the counsel of the LORD, that he hath taken against Babylon; and his purposes, that he hath purposed against the land of the Chaldeans: Surely the least of the flock shall draw them out: surely he shall make habitation desolate with them.

chapters.zh: 因巴比伦被取的声音，地就震动，人在列邦都听见呼喊的声音。
chapters.en: At the noise of the taking of Babylon the earth is moved, and the cry is heard among the nations.

chapters.zh: 耶和华如此说：我必使毁灭的风刮起，攻击巴比伦和住在立加米的人。
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD; Behold, I will raise up against Babylon, and against them that dwell in the midst of them that rise up against me, a destroying wind;

chapters.zh: 我要打发外邦人来到巴比伦，簸扬他，使他的地空虚。在他遭祸的日子，他们要周围攻击他。
chapters.en: And will send unto Babylon fanners, that shall fan her, and shall empty her land: for in the day of trouble they shall be against her round about.

chapters.zh: 拉弓的，要向拉弓的和贯甲挺身的射箭。不要怜惜他的少年人；要灭尽他的全军。
chapters.en: Against bendeth let the archer bend his bow, and against lifteth himself up in his brigandine: and spare ye not her young men; destroy ye utterly all her host.

chapters.zh: 他们必在迦勒底人之地被杀仆倒，在巴比伦的街上被刺透。
chapters.en: Thus the slain shall fall in the land of the Chaldeans, and thrust through in her streets.

chapters.zh: 以色列和犹大虽然境内充满违背以色列圣者的罪，却没有被他的神 ─ 万军之耶和华丢弃。
chapters.en: For Israel not forsaken, nor Judah of his God, of the LORD of hosts; though their land was filled with sin against the Holy One of Israel.

chapters.zh: 你们要从巴比伦中逃奔，各救自己的性命！不要陷在他的罪孽中一同灭亡；因为这是耶和华报仇的时候，他必向巴比伦施行报应。
chapters.en: Flee out of the midst of Babylon, and deliver every man his soul: be not cut off in her iniquity; for this the time of the LORD'S vengeance; he will render unto her a recompence.

chapters.zh: 巴比伦素来是耶和华手中的金杯，使天下沉醉；万国喝了他的酒就颠狂了。
chapters.en: Babylon a golden cup in the LORD'S hand, that made all the earth drunken: the nations have drunken of her wine; therefore the nations are mad.

chapters.zh: 巴比伦忽然倾覆毁坏；要为他哀号；为止他的疼痛，拿乳香或者可以治好。
chapters.en: Babylon is suddenly fallen and destroyed: howl for her; take balm for her pain, if so be she may be healed.

chapters.zh: 我们想医治巴比伦，他却没有治好。离开他罢！我们各人归回本国；因为他受的审判通于上天，达到穹苍。
chapters.en: We would have healed Babylon, but she is not healed: forsake her, and let us go every one into his own country: for her judgment reacheth unto heaven, and is lifted up to the skies.

chapters.zh: 耶和华已经彰显我们的公义。来罢！我们可以在锡安报告耶和华 ─ 我们神的作为。
chapters.en: The LORD hath brought forth our righteousness: come, and let us declare in Zion the work of the LORD our God.

chapters.zh: 你们要磨尖了箭头，抓住盾牌。耶和华定意攻击巴比伦，将他毁灭，所以激动了玛代君王的心；因这是耶和华报仇，就是为自己的殿报仇。
chapters.en: Make bright the arrows; gather the shields: the LORD hath raised up the spirit of the kings of the Medes: for his device against Babylon, to destroy it; because it the vengeance of the LORD, the vengeance of his temple.

chapters.zh: 你们要竖立大旗，攻击巴比伦的城墙；要坚固瞭望台，派定守望的设下埋伏；因为耶和华指著巴比伦居民所说的话、所定的意，他已经作成。
chapters.en: Set up the standard upon the walls of Babylon, make the watch strong, set up the watchmen, prepare the ambushes: for the LORD hath both devised and done that which he spake against the inhabitants of Babylon.

chapters.zh: 住在众水之上多有财宝的啊，你的结局到了！你贪婪之量满了！
chapters.en: O thou that dwellest upon many waters, abundant in treasures, thine end is come, the measure of thy covetousness.

chapters.zh: 万军之耶和华指著自己起誓说：我必使敌人充满你，像蚂蚱一样；他们必呐喊攻击你。
chapters.en: The LORD of hosts hath sworn by himself, , Surely I will fill thee with men, as with caterpillers; and they shall lift up a shout against thee.

chapters.zh: 耶和华用能力创造大地，用智慧建立世界，用聪明铺张穹苍。
chapters.en: He hath made the earth by his power, he hath established the world by his wisdom, and hath stretched out the heaven by his understanding.

chapters.zh: 他一发声，空中便有多水激动；他使云雾从地极上腾。他造电随雨而闪，从他府库中带出风来。
chapters.en: When he uttereth voice, a multitude of waters in the heavens; and he causeth the vapours to ascend from the ends of the earth: he maketh lightnings with rain, and bringeth forth the wind out of his treasures.

chapters.zh: 各人都成了畜类，毫无知识。各银匠都因他的偶像羞愧；他所铸的偶像本是虚假的，其中并无气息，
chapters.en: Every man is brutish by knowledge; every founder is confounded by the graven image: for his molten image falsehood, and no breath in them.

chapters.zh: 都是虚无的，是迷惑人的工作，到追讨的时候，必被除灭。
chapters.en: They vanity, the work of errors: in the time of their visitation they shall perish.

chapters.zh: 雅各的分不像这些，因他是造作万有的主；以色列也是他产业的支派。万军之耶和华是他的名。
chapters.en: The portion of Jacob not like them; for he the former of all things: and the rod of his inheritance: the LORD of hosts his name.

chapters.zh: 你是我争战的斧子和打仗的兵器；我要用你打碎列国，用你毁灭列邦；
chapters.en: Thou my battle axe weapons of war: for with thee will I break in pieces the nations, and with thee will I destroy kingdoms;

chapters.zh: 用你打碎马和骑马的；用你打碎战车和坐在其上的；
chapters.en: And with thee will I break in pieces the horse and his rider; and with thee will I break in pieces the chariot and his rider;

chapters.zh: 用你打碎男人和女人；用你打碎老年人和少年人；用你打碎壮丁和处女；
chapters.en: With thee also will I break in pieces man and woman; and with thee will I break in pieces old and young; and with thee will I break in pieces the young man and the maid;

chapters.zh: 用你打碎牧人和他的群畜；用你打碎农夫和他一对牛；用你打碎省长和副省长。
chapters.en: I will also break in pieces with thee the shepherd and his flock; and with thee will I break in pieces the husbandman and his yoke of oxen; and with thee will I break in pieces captains and rulers.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：我必在你们眼前报复巴比伦人和迦勒底居民在锡安所行的诸恶。
chapters.en: And I will render unto Babylon and to all the inhabitants of Chaldea all their evil that they have done in Zion in your sight, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：你这行毁灭的山哪，就是毁灭天下的山，我与你反对。我必向你伸手，将你从山岩滚下去，使你成为烧毁的山。
chapters.en: Behold, I against thee, O destroying mountain, saith the LORD, which destroyest all the earth: and I will stretch out mine hand upon thee, and roll thee down from the rocks, and will make thee a burnt mountain.

chapters.zh: 人必不从你那里取石头为房角石，也不取石头为根基石；你必永远荒凉。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: And they shall not take of thee a stone for a corner, nor a stone for foundations; but thou shalt be desolate for ever, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 要在境内竖立大旗，在各国中吹角，使列国预备攻击巴比伦，将亚拉腊、米尼、亚实基拿各国招来攻击他；又派军长来攻击他，使马匹上来如蚂蚱，
chapters.en: Set ye up a standard in the land, blow the trumpet among the nations, prepare the nations against her, call together against her the kingdoms of Ararat, Minni, and Ashchenaz; appoint a captain against her; cause the horses to come up as the rough caterpillers.

chapters.zh: 使列国和玛代君王，与省长和副省长，并他们所管全地之人，都预备攻击他。
chapters.en: Prepare against her the nations with the kings of the Medes, the captains thereof, and all the rulers thereof, and all the land of his dominion.

chapters.zh: 地必震动而瘠苦；因耶和华向巴比伦所定的旨意成立了，使巴比伦之地荒凉，无人居住。
chapters.en: And the land shall tremble and sorrow: for every purpose of the LORD shall be performed against Babylon, to make the land of Babylon a desolation without an inhabitant.

chapters.zh: 巴比伦的勇士止息争战，藏在坚垒之中。他们的勇力衰尽，好像妇女一样。巴比伦的住处有火著起，门闩都折断了。
chapters.en: The mighty men of Babylon have forborn to fight, they have remained in holds: their might hath failed; they became as women: they have burned her dwellingplaces; her bars are broken.

chapters.zh: 通报的要彼此相遇，送信的要互相迎接，报告巴比伦王说：城的四方被攻取了，
chapters.en: One post shall run to meet another, and one messenger to meet another, to shew the king of Babylon that his city is taken at end,

chapters.zh: 渡口被占据了，苇塘被火烧了，兵丁也惊慌了。
chapters.en: And that the passages are stopped, and the reeds they have burned with fire, and the men of war are affrighted.

chapters.zh: 万军之耶和华 ─ 以色列的神如此说：巴比伦城（原文作女子）好像踹谷的禾场；再过片时，收割他的时候就到了。
chapters.en: For thus saith the LORD of hosts, the God of Israel; The daughter of Babylon like a threshingfloor, time to thresh her: yet a little while, and the time of her harvest shall come.

chapters.zh: 以色列人说：巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒吞灭我，压碎我，使我成为空虚的器皿。他像大鱼将我吞下，用我的美物充满他的肚腹，又将我赶出去。
chapters.en: Nebuchadrezzar the king of Babylon hath devoured me, he hath crushed me, he hath made me an empty vessel, he hath swallowed me up like a dragon, he hath filled his belly with my delicates, he hath cast me out.

chapters.zh: 锡安的居民要说：巴比伦以强暴待我，损害我的身体，愿这罪归给他。耶路撒冷人要说：愿流我们血的罪归到迦勒底的居民。
chapters.en: The violence done to me and to my flesh upon Babylon, shall the inhabitant of Zion say; and my blood upon the inhabitants of Chaldea, shall Jerusalem say.

chapters.zh: 所以，耶和华如此说：我必为你伸冤，为你报仇；我必使巴比伦的海枯竭，使他的泉源干涸。
chapters.en: Therefore thus saith the LORD; Behold, I will plead thy cause, and take vengeance for thee; and I will dry up her sea, and make her springs dry.

chapters.zh: 巴比伦必成为乱堆，为野狗的住处，令人惊骇、嗤笑，并且无人居住。
chapters.en: And Babylon shall become heaps, a dwellingplace for dragons, an astonishment, and an hissing, without an inhabitant.

chapters.zh: 他们要像少壮狮子咆哮，像小狮子吼叫。
chapters.en: They shall roar together like lions: they shall yell as lions' whelps.

chapters.zh: 他们火热的时候，我必为他们设摆酒席，使他们沉醉，好叫他们快乐，睡了长觉，永不醒起。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: In their heat I will make their feasts, and I will make them drunken, that they may rejoice, and sleep a perpetual sleep, and not wake, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 我必使他们像羊羔、像公绵羊和公山羊下到宰杀之地。
chapters.en: I will bring them down like lambs to the slaughter, like rams with he goats.

chapters.zh: 示沙克（就是巴比伦）何竟被攻取，天下所称赞的何竟被占据？巴比伦在列国中何竟变为荒场？
chapters.en: How is Sheshach taken! and how is the praise of the whole earth surprised! how is Babylon become an astonishment among the nations!

chapters.zh: 海水涨起，漫过巴比伦；他被许多海浪遮盖。
chapters.en: The sea is come up upon Babylon: she is covered with the multitude of the waves thereof.

chapters.zh: 他的城邑变为荒场、旱地、沙漠，无人居住，无人经过之地。
chapters.en: Her cities are a desolation, a dry land, and a wilderness, a land wherein no man dwelleth, neither doth son of man pass thereby.

chapters.zh: 我必刑罚巴比伦的彼勒，使他吐出所吞的。万民必不再流归他那里；巴比伦的城墙也必坍塌了。
chapters.en: And I will punish Bel in Babylon, and I will bring forth out of his mouth that which he hath swallowed up: and the nations shall not flow together any more unto him: yea, the wall of Babylon shall fall.

chapters.zh: 我的民哪，你们要从其中出去！各人拯救自己，躲避耶和华的烈怒。
chapters.en: My people, go ye out of the midst of her, and deliver ye every man his soul from the fierce anger of the LORD.

chapters.zh: 你们不要心惊胆怯，也不要因境内所听见的风声惧怕；因为这年有风声传来；那年也有风声传来，境内有强暴的事，官长攻击官长。
chapters.en: And lest your heart faint, and ye fear for the rumour that shall be heard in the land; a rumour shall both come year, and after that in year a rumour, and violence in the land, ruler against ruler.

chapters.zh: 日子将到，我必刑罚巴比伦雕刻的偶像。他全地必然抱愧；他被杀的人必在其中仆倒。
chapters.en: Therefore, behold, the days come, that I will do judgment upon the graven images of Babylon: and her whole land shall be confounded, and all her slain shall fall in the midst of her.

chapters.zh: 那时，天地和其中所有的，必因巴比伦欢呼，因为行毁灭的要从北方来到他那里。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: Then the heaven and the earth, and all that therein, shall sing for Babylon: for the spoilers shall come unto her from the north, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 巴比伦怎样使以色列被杀的人仆倒，照样他全地被杀的人也必在巴比伦仆倒。
chapters.en: As Babylon the slain of Israel to fall, so at Babylon shall fall the slain of all the earth.

chapters.zh: 你们躲避刀剑的要快走，不要站住！要在远方记念耶和华，心中追想耶路撒冷。
chapters.en: Ye that have escaped the sword, go away, stand not still: remember the LORD afar off, and let Jerusalem come into your mind.

chapters.zh: 我们听见辱骂就蒙羞，满面惭愧，因为外邦人进入耶和华殿的圣所。
chapters.en: We are confounded, because we have heard reproach: shame hath covered our faces: for strangers are come into the sanctuaries of the LORD'S house.

chapters.zh: 耶和华说：日子将到，我必刑罚巴比伦雕刻的偶像，通国受伤的人必唉哼。
chapters.en: Wherefore, behold, the days come, saith the LORD, that I will do judgment upon her graven images: and through all her land the wounded shall groan.

chapters.zh: 巴比伦虽升到天上，虽使他坚固的高处更坚固，还有行毁灭的从我这里到他那里。这是耶和华说的。
chapters.en: Though Babylon should mount up to heaven, and though she should fortify the height of her strength, from me shall spoilers come unto her, saith the LORD.

chapters.zh: 有哀号的声音从巴比伦出来；有大毁灭的响声从迦勒底人之地发出。
chapters.en: A sound of a cry from Babylon, and great destruction from the land of the Chaldeans:

chapters.zh: 因耶和华使巴比伦变为荒场，使其中的大声灭绝。仇敌彷佛众水，波浪匉訇，响声已经发出。
chapters.en: Because the LORD hath spoiled Babylon, and destroyed out of her the great voice; when her waves do roar like great waters, a noise of their voice is uttered:

chapters.zh: 这是行毁灭的临到巴比伦。巴比伦的勇士被捉住，他们的弓折断了；因为耶和华是施行报应的神，必定施行报应。
chapters.en: Because the spoiler is come upon her, upon Babylon, and her mighty men are taken, every one of their bows is broken: for the LORD God of recompences shall surely requite.

chapters.zh: 君王 ─ 名为万军之耶和华的说：我必使巴比伦的首领、智慧人、省长、副省长，和勇士都沉醉，使他们睡了长觉，永不醒起。
chapters.en: And I will make drunk her princes, and her wise , her captains, and her rulers, and her mighty men: and they shall sleep a perpetual sleep, and not wake, saith the King, whose name the LORD of hosts.

chapters.zh: 万军之耶和华如此说：巴比伦宽阔的城墙必全然倾倒；他高大的城门必被火焚烧。众民所劳碌的必致虚空；列国所劳碌的被火焚烧，他们都必困乏。
chapters.en: Thus saith the LORD of hosts; The broad walls of Babylon shall be utterly broken, and her high gates shall be burned with fire; and the people shall labour in vain, and the folk in the fire, and they shall be weary.

chapters.zh: 犹大王西底家在位第四年，上巴比伦去的时候，玛西雅的孙子、尼利亚的儿子西莱雅与王同去（西莱雅是王宫的大臣），先知耶利米有话吩咐他。
chapters.en: The word which Jeremiah the prophet commanded Seraiah the son of Neriah, the son of Maaseiah, when he went with Zedekiah the king of Judah into Babylon in the fourth year of his reign. And Seraiah a quiet prince.

chapters.zh: 耶利米将一切要临到巴比伦的灾祸，就是论到巴比伦的一切话，写在书上。
chapters.en: So Jeremiah wrote in a book all the evil that should come upon Babylon, all these words that are written against Babylon.

chapters.zh: 耶利米对西莱雅说：你到了巴比伦务要念这书上的话；
chapters.en: And Jeremiah said to Seraiah, When thou comest to Babylon, and shalt see, and shalt read all these words;

chapters.zh: 又说：耶和华啊，你曾论到这地方说：要剪除，甚至连人带牲畜没有在这里居住的，必永远荒凉。
chapters.en: Then shalt thou say, O LORD, thou hast spoken against this place, to cut it off, that none shall remain in it, neither man nor beast, but that it shall be desolate for ever.

chapters.zh: 你念完了这书，就把一块石头拴在书上，扔在伯拉河中，
chapters.en: And it shall be, when thou hast made an end of reading this book, thou shalt bind a stone to it, and cast it into the midst of Euphrates:

chapters.zh: 说：巴比伦因耶和华所要降与他的灾祸，必如此沉下去，不再兴起，人民也必困乏。耶利米的话到此为止。
chapters.en: And thou shalt say, Thus shall Babylon sink, and shall not rise from the evil that I will bring upon her: and they shall be weary. Thus far the words of Jeremiah.

chapters.zh: 西底家登基的时候年二十一岁，在耶路撒冷作王十一年。他母亲名叫哈慕他，是立拿人耶利米的女儿。
chapters.en: Zedekiah one and twenty years old when he began to reign, and he reigned eleven years in Jerusalem. And his mother's name Hamutal the daughter of Jeremiah of Libnah.

chapters.zh: 西底家行耶和华眼中看为恶的事，是照约雅敬一切所行的。
chapters.en: And he did evil in the eyes of the LORD, according to all that Jehoiakim had done.

chapters.zh: 因此耶和华的怒气在耶路撒冷和犹大发作，以致将人民从自己的面前赶出。
chapters.en: For through the anger of the LORD it came to pass in Jerusalem and Judah, till he had cast them out from his presence, that Zedekiah rebelled against the king of Babylon.

chapters.zh: 西底家背叛巴比伦王。他作王第九年十月初十日，巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒率领全军来攻击耶路撒冷，对城安营，四围筑垒攻城。
chapters.en: And it came to pass in the ninth year of his reign, in the tenth month, in the tenth of the month, Nebuchadrezzar king of Babylon came, he and all his army, against Jerusalem, and pitched against it, and built forts against it round about.

chapters.zh: 于是城被围困直到西底家王十一年。
chapters.en: So the city was besieged unto the eleventh year of king Zedekiah.

chapters.zh: 四月初九日，城里有大饥荒，甚至百姓都没有粮食。
chapters.en: And in the fourth month, in the ninth of the month, the famine was sore in the city, so that there was no bread for the people of the land.

chapters.zh: 城被攻破，一切兵丁就在夜间从靠近王园两城中间的门，出城逃跑；迦勒底人正在四围攻城。他们就往亚拉巴逃去。
chapters.en: Then the city was broken up, and all the men of war fled, and went forth out of the city by night by the way of the gate between the two walls, which by the king's garden; (now the Chaldeans by the city round about:) and they went by the way of the plain.

chapters.zh: 迦勒底的军队追赶西底家王，在耶利哥的平原追上他。他的全军都离开他四散了。
chapters.en: But the army of the Chaldeans pursued after the king, and overtook Zedekiah in the plains of Jericho; and all his army was scattered from him.

chapters.zh: 迦勒底人就拿住王，带他到在哈马地利比拉的巴比伦王那里；巴比伦王便审判他。
chapters.en: Then they took the king, and carried him up unto the king of Babylon to Riblah in the land of Hamath; where he gave judgment upon him.

chapters.zh: 巴比伦王在西底家眼前杀了他的众子，又在利比拉杀了犹大的一切首领，
chapters.en: And the king of Babylon slew the sons of Zedekiah before his eyes: he slew also all the princes of Judah in Riblah.

chapters.zh: 并且剜了西底家的眼睛，用铜炼锁著他，带到巴比伦去，将他囚在监里，直到他死的日子。
chapters.en: Then he put out the eyes of Zedekiah; and the king of Babylon bound him in chains, and carried him to Babylon, and put him in prison till the day of his death.

chapters.zh: 巴比伦王尼布甲尼撒十九年五月初十日，在巴比伦王面前侍立的护卫长尼布撒拉旦进入耶路撒冷，
chapters.en: Now in the fifth month, in the tenth of the month, which the nineteenth year of Nebuchadrezzar king of Babylon, came Nebuzaradan, captain of the guard, served the king of Babylon, into Jerusalem,

chapters.zh: 用火焚烧耶和华的殿和王宫，又焚烧耶路撒冷的房屋，就是各大户家的房屋。
chapters.en: And burned the house of the LORD, and the king's house; and all the houses of Jerusalem, and all the houses of the great , burned he with fire:

chapters.zh: 跟从护卫长迦勒底的全军就拆毁耶路撒冷四围的城墙。
chapters.en: And all the army of the Chaldeans, that with the captain of the guard, brake down all the walls of Jerusalem round about.

chapters.zh: 那时护卫长尼布撒拉旦将民中最穷的和城里所剩下的百姓，并已经投降巴比伦王的人，以及大众所剩下的人，都掳去了。
chapters.en: Then Nebuzaradan the captain of the guard carried away captive of the poor of the people, and the residue of the people that remained in the city, and those that fell away, that fell to the king of Babylon, and the rest of the multitude.

chapters.zh: 但护卫长尼布撒拉旦留下些民中最穷的，使他们修理葡萄园，耕种田地。
chapters.en: But Nebuzaradan the captain of the guard left of the poor of the land for vinedressers and for husbandmen.

chapters.zh: 耶和华殿的铜柱并殿内的盆座和铜海，迦勒底人都打碎了，将那铜运到巴比伦去了，
chapters.en: Also the pillars of brass that in the house of the LORD, and the bases, and the brasen sea that in the house of the LORD, the Chaldeans brake, and carried all the brass of them to Babylon.

chapters.zh: 又带去锅、铲子、蜡剪、盘子、调羹，并所用的一切铜器、
chapters.en: The caldrons also, and the shovels, and the snuffers, and the bowls, and the spoons, and all the vessels of brass wherewith they ministered, took they away.

chapters.zh: 杯、火鼎、碗、盆、灯台、调羹、爵，无论金的银的，护卫长也都带去了。
chapters.en: And the basons, and the firepans, and the bowls, and the caldrons, and the candlesticks, and the spoons, and the cups; which of gold gold, and which of silver silver, took the captain of the guard away.

chapters.zh: 所罗门为耶和华殿所造的两根铜柱、一个铜海，并座下的十二只铜牛，这一切的铜多得无法可称。
chapters.en: The two pillars, one sea, and twelve brasen bulls that under the bases, which king Solomon had made in the house of the LORD: the brass of all these vessels was without weight.

chapters.zh: 这一根柱子高十八肘，厚四指，是空的，围十二肘。
chapters.en: And the pillars, the height of one pillar eighteen cubits; and a fillet of twelve cubits did compass it; and the thickness thereof four fingers: hollow.

chapters.zh: 柱上有铜顶，高五肘；铜顶的周围有网子和石榴，都是铜的。那一根柱子照此一样，也有石榴。
chapters.en: And a chapiter of brass upon it; and the height of one chapiter five cubits, with network and pomegranates upon the chapiters round about, all brass. The second pillar also and the pomegranates like unto these.

chapters.zh: 柱子四面有九十六个石榴，在网子周围，共有一百石榴。
chapters.en: And there were ninety and six pomegranates on a side; all the pomegranates upon the network an hundred round about.

chapters.zh: 护卫长拿住大祭司西莱雅、副祭司西番亚，和三个把门的，
chapters.en: And the captain of the guard took Seraiah the chief priest, and Zephaniah the second priest, and the three keepers of the door:

chapters.zh: 又从城中拿住一个管理兵丁的官（或译：太监），并在城里所遇常见王面的七个人和检点国民军长的书记，以及城里所遇见的国民六十个人。
chapters.en: He took also out of the city an eunuch, which had the charge of the men of war; and seven men of them that were near the king's person, which were found in the city; and the principal scribe of the host, who mustered the people of the land; and threescore men of the people of the land, that were found in the midst of the city.

chapters.zh: 护卫长尼布撒拉旦将这些人带到利比拉的巴比伦王那里。
chapters.en: So Nebuzaradan the captain of the guard took them, and brought them to the king of Babylon to Riblah.

chapters.zh: 巴比伦王就把他们击杀在哈马地的利比拉。这样，犹大人被掳去离开本地。
chapters.en: And the king of Babylon smote them, and put them to death in Riblah in the land of Hamath. Thus Judah was carried away captive out of his own land.

chapters.zh: 尼布甲尼撒所掳的民数记在下面：在他第七年掳去犹大人三千零二十三名；
chapters.en: This the people whom Nebuchadrezzar carried away captive: in the seventh year three thousand Jews and three and twenty:

chapters.zh: 尼布甲尼撒十八年从耶路撒冷掳去八百三十二人；
chapters.en: In the eighteenth year of Nebuchadrezzar he carried away captive from Jerusalem eight hundred thirty and two persons:

chapters.zh: 尼布甲尼撒二十三年，护卫长尼布撒拉旦掳去犹大人七百四十五名；共有四千六百人。
chapters.en: In the three and twentieth year of Nebuchadrezzar Nebuzaradan the captain of the guard carried away captive of the Jews seven hundred forty and five persons: all the persons four thousand and six hundred.

chapters.zh: 犹大王约雅斤被掳后三十七年，巴比伦王以未米罗达元年十二月二十五日，使犹大王约雅斤抬头，提他出监，
chapters.en: And it came to pass in the seven and thirtieth year of the captivity of Jehoiachin king of Judah, in the twelfth month, in the five and twentieth of the month, Evilmerodach king of Babylon in the year of his reign lifted up the head of Jehoiachin king of Judah, and brought him forth out of prison,

chapters.zh: 又对他说恩言，使他的位高过与他一同在巴比伦众王的位，
chapters.en: And spake kindly unto him, and set his throne above the throne of the kings that with him in Babylon,

chapters.zh: 给他脱了囚服。他终身在巴比伦王面前吃饭。
chapters.en: And changed his prison garments: and he did continually eat bread before him all the days of his life.

chapters.zh: 巴比伦王赐他所需用的食物，日日赐他一分，终身是这样，直到他死的日子。
chapters.en: And his diet, there was a continual diet given him of the king of Babylon, every day a portion until the day of his death, all the days of his life.
